# 荧光数据处理

为了证明ST的可靠性，我们取了与空间转录组中相邻的小鼠切片进行免疫荧光染色。获得了GFAP、P2RY12、DAPI（标记细胞核）、硫磺素（标记Aβ）四种物质的空间定位。

## 1 图像处理

主要包括图像配准、导入spots、spots荧光定量三步。

### 图像配准

所谓的图像配准，就是把荧光图像和空间转录组的图像对齐，使得荧光图像上的斑块坐标和空转上spot的坐标是对应的，这样才能得到每个spot附近的荧光强度。使用Fiji plugin "Landmark correspondences"手动进行对齐

### 导入spots

用了QuPath-0.4.3来帮助把spots的位置导入为imageJ中的ROI（region of interested）。

```{r eval=FALSE}
# QuPath 批处理脚本。

//https://forum.image.sc/t/reading-csv-table-in-qupath/32772/3
//From @melvingelbard
import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.FileReader;
import java.awt.Color; 
import qupath.lib.objects.PathAnnotationObject;
import qupath.lib.roi.ROIs
import qupath.lib.roi.EllipseROI

double spot_diameter_fullres = 112.282074;
def csvfile = 'C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/subprojects/2023-07-05_图像分析/005second_batch/workdir/PLX5622/tissue_positions_list.color.csv' // TO CHANGE

def imageData = getCurrentImageData();

// Create BufferedReader
def csvReader = new BufferedReader(new FileReader(csvfile));

def plane = ImagePlane.getDefaultPlane();

// Loop through all the rows of the CSV file.
while ((row = csvReader.readLine()) != null) {
    def rowContent = row.split(",")
    String barcode = rowContent[0] as String;
    // println barcode; 
    int  in_tissue = rowContent[1] as int;
    int  array_row = rowContent[2] as int;
    int  array_col = rowContent[3] as int;
    double cx = rowContent[4] as double;
    //cx = cx * scale_factor;
    double cy = rowContent[5] as double;
    //cy = cy * scale_factor;
    int R = rowContent[6] as int;
    int G = rowContent[7] as int;
    int B = rowContent[8] as int;
    
    // Create annotation
    if (in_tissue) {
        double px = cx - spot_diameter_fullres/2;
        double py = cy - spot_diameter_fullres/2;
        def roi = new EllipseROI(py, px, spot_diameter_fullres, spot_diameter_fullres, plane); 
        def annotation = new PathAnnotationObject(roi, PathClass.fromString(barcode)); 
        annotation.setColor(R, G, B); 
        annotation.getMeasurementList().putMeasurement("array_row", array_row);
        annotation.getMeasurementList().putMeasurement("array_col", array_col);
        annotation.getMeasurementList().putMeasurement("cx", cx);
        annotation.getMeasurementList().putMeasurement("cy", cy);
        imageData.getHierarchy().addObject(annotation);
    }
}
```

### spots荧光定量

输入文件准备：`010add_color.r`

结果整理脚本：`010reshape_result.r`

```{r eval=FALSE}
// 这是Fij的脚本

// 对每个spots进行荧光定量。

sample_names = newArray("WTCtrl", "FADCtrl", "PLX5622");
sample_codes = newArray("22", "21", "7");

// sample_names = newArray("FADCtrl", "PLX5622");
// sample_codes = newArray("21", "7");

channels =  newArray("ch00", "ch01", "ch02", "ch03"); 

for (s=0; s < sample_names.length; s++){
  sample_name = sample_names[s];
  sample_code = sample_codes[s]; 
  workdir = "C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/subprojects/2023-07-05_image_analysis/002registeration/" + sample_name; 
  fig_prefix = "Transformed" + sample_code + " 10X.lif_" + sample_code + "_";
  for (i=0; i<channels.length; i++) {
    print(i); 
    channel = channels[i]; 
    open(workdir + "/" + fig_prefix + channel + ".tif");
    run("8-bit");
    //setAutoThreshold("Moments dark no-reset");
    //run("Threshold...");
    if (channel == "ch00") {setThreshold(39, 255);}
    if (channel == "ch01") {setThreshold(17, 255);}
    if (channel == "ch02") {setThreshold(19, 255);}
    if (channel == "ch03") {setThreshold(30, 255);}
    setOption("BlackBackground", true);
    run("Convert to Mask");
    run("Scale...", "x=0.2 y=0.2 interpolation=Bilinear average create");
    saveAs("Jpeg", workdir + "/" + fig_prefix + channel + ".jpg");
    close();
    roiManager("Open", workdir + "/RoiSet.zip");
    run("Set Measurements...", "mean standard median redirect=None decimal=3");
    roiManager("Multi Measure");
    saveAs("Results", workdir + "/Results." + channel + ".csv");
    run("Close");
    close();
  }
}
```

## 2 图像与空转联合分析

channel与荧光信号的对应关系：

batch1：ch00=Gfap; ch01=P2ry12; ch02=Abeta; ch03=DAPI. 

batch2：ch01=DAPI; ch02=Abeta; ch03=P2ry12; ch04=Gfap. 

分析要点：

1，三种蛋白和mRNA的关联。Aβ、GFAP、P2RY12相关基因。

和Aβ最相关的是Thy1，和GFAP最相关的是Gfap，符合预期。但是和P2RY12最相关的基因却不是P2RY12，而是其他基因。

2，三种蛋白和细胞类型的关联。Aβ、GFAP、P2RY12相关细胞类型。

已经调查了Aβ和不同小胶亚型的关联。Aβ和DAM关联度更高。

GFAP和哪种星形胶质细胞亚型关联更大？P2RY12呢？

## 3 Gfap和P2ry12相关基因

Gfap和P2ry12在荧光染色和空转中的一致性

```{r eval=FALSE}

# P2ry12荧光强度与基因表达的相关系数。
source("script/load_checkpoint.r")

outdir <- "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence"
if (! dir.exists(outdir)){
  dir.create(outdir)
}

expr <- testcombo@expression$cell$rna$normalized@exprMat

library(parallel)

# sample <- "FADCtrl"
treatments <- c("FADCtrl", "WTCtrl", "PLX5622")

for (i.gene in c("P2ry12", "Gfap")){
  for (treatment in treatments){
    for (batch in c("1", "2")){
      sample <- paste0(treatment, "_", batch)
      cat("doing sample:", sample, ";", "gene:", i.gene, "\n")
      if (batch == "1"){
        save.dir <- file.path(outdir, "measurement")
        if (i.gene == "P2ry12") {
          channel <- "ch01"
        } else if (i.gene == "Gfap"){
          channel <- "ch00"
        }
        infile <- file.path(save.dir, 
                            treatment, 
                            paste0("Results.", channel, ".reshaped.csv"))
      } else if (batch == "2") {
        save.dir <- file.path(outdir, "batch2")
        if (i.gene == "P2ry12") {
          channel <- "ch03"
        } else if (i.gene == "Gfap"){
          channel <- "ch04"
        }
        infile <- file.path(save.dir, 
                            treatment, 
                            paste0("Results.", channel, ".reshaped.csv"))
      }
      measure <- read.csv(infile, row.names=1)
      measure$barcode <- paste0(sample, "-", measure$barcode)
      
      row.names(measure) <- measure$barcode
      barcode.inter <- intersect(measure$barcode, colnames(expr))
      measure.filt <- measure[barcode.inter, ]
      immuno.index <- measure.filt$Mean
      
      gene.list <- as.vector(row.names(expr))
      
      out.list <- mclapply(gene.list, function(gene){
        gene.expr <- expr[gene, measure.filt$barcode]
        cor.result <- cor.test(gene.expr, immuno.index, method="spearman", exact = FALSE)
        e <- cor.result$estimate
        p <- cor.result$p.value
        return(c(e, p))
      }, mc.cores=50)
      
      out.df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, out.list))
      names(out.df) <- c("rho", "pvalue")
      out.df$gene <- gene.list
      out.df$fdr <- p.adjust(out.df$pvalue)
      out.df <- out.df[order(out.df$pvalue), ]
      out.df.filt <- out.df[out.df$fdr < 0.05, ]
      
      out.path <- file.path(save.dir, treatment, paste0("cor.", i.gene, ".csv"))
      write.csv(out.df, out.path)
      out.path <- file.path(save.dir, treatment, paste0("cor.", i.gene, ".filt.csv"))
      write.csv(out.df.filt, out.path)
    }
  }
}

# measurement/*/cor.ch02.filt.csv
# batch2/*/cor.ch02.filt.csv
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
gene <- "P2ry12"
gene <- "Gfap"
gene <- "ch02"

df.list <- list()
n <- 1
for (treatment in c("WTCtrl", "FADCtrl", "PLX5622")){
  for (batch in c("1", "2")){
    if (batch == "1"){
      in.dir <- "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/measurement"
      in.file <- file.path(in.dir, treatment, 
                           paste0("cor.", gene, ".filt.csv"))
    }
    else if(batch == "2"){
      in.dir <- "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/batch2"
      in.file <- file.path(in.dir, treatment, 
                           paste0("cor.", gene, ".filt.csv"))
    }
    df <- read.csv(in.file)
    df$treatment <- treatment
    df$batch <- batch
    df.list[[n]] <- df
    n <- n+1
  }
}

# 正相关top10
df.list.top10 <- lapply(df.list, function(x){
  x <- x[x$rho > 0, ]
  x$rank <- rank(x$fdr)
  head(x, 10)
  })

df.merged <- do.call(rbind, df.list.top10)
p <- ggplot(df.merged, aes(rank, rho)) + geom_point() + 
  geom_text_repel(aes(label=gene), max.overlaps=10) + 
  facet_grid(treatment~batch)

out.file <- paste0("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/cor.", 
                   gene, ".top10.png")
ggsave(out.file, p, width=10, height=8)

# GFAP的荧光图像。同一处理，不同信号来源（Image、Allen、ST、Deconvo）的比较。Allen的图像来源于野生型，因而只能和WTCtrl的比；Deconvo展示的可能是reactive astrocytes的信号，用于比较的时候要小心。最主要还是比较Image和ST的区别。脑膜、皮层内侧、丘脑的表达都是比较一致的，只是Fiber tracts的不太一致。
```

```{r ImmunoGfap, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Gfap immuno. images"}
knitr::include_graphics("data/st/010/Gfap.png")
```

```{r ImmunoP2ry12, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="P2ry12 immuno. images"}
knitr::include_graphics("data/st/010/P2ry12.png")
```

```{r ImmunoThy1, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Spatial expression of Thy1 gene and and immuno. images of Plaque"}
knitr::include_graphics("data/st/010/Thy1.png")
```

(ref:signalExprCorGfap) 在各样品中表达量与Gfap荧光信号相关性最高的前10个基因。

```{r signalExprCorGfap, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="(ref:signalExprCorGfap)"}
knitr::include_graphics("data/st/010/cor.Gfap.top10.png")
```

(ref:signalExprCorP2ry12) 在各样品中表达量与P2ry12荧光信号相关性最高的前10个基因。

```{r signalExprCorP2ry12, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="(ref:signalExprCorP2ry12)"}
knitr::include_graphics("data/st/010/cor.P2ry12.top10.png")
```

从基因的空间荧光图像与空间转录组表达之间的比较图可以看见，两者一致性较高（Figure \@ref(fig:ImmunoGfap)；Figure \@ref(fig:ImmunoP2ry12)；Figure \@ref(fig:ImmunoThy1)）。与Gfap荧光信号最强的基因是Gfap（Figure \@ref(fig:signalExprCorGfap)），但是与P2ry12信号相关性最强的却不是P2ry12（Figure \@ref(fig:signalExprCorP2ry12)），可能的原因有：

-   P2ry12在大脑的空间表达模式不明显。有这样空间表达模式的基因很多，因此这些基因与P2ry12都有较强的相关性。
-   P2ry12的表达量比较低，导致相关性弱。
-   P2ry12的蛋白表达分布与基因表达的分布不一致。但是从上面的基因空间表达图谱看来，这条不成立。

## 4 Aβ相关基因

用了两种方法来鉴定。PCGs和PIGs。

PCGs的结果储存在`001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/PLX5622_specific_PIGs.csv`以及
`001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/FADCtrl_specific_PIGs.csv`

PIGs的结果储存在`001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/PIG/PIGs.lfc_0.1.csv`

论文里面现在用的是哪个版本？应该是PIGs的版本。我把这个版本的表格删除了WTCtrl的部分后，加到了附表中。

### PCGs

计算斑块指数与基因表达量之间的相关性。以某一阈值选取相关性高的基因，即为PCGs。

PCG：plaque correlated genes。

#### 第一批荧光数据处理
```{r eval=FALSE}
"010immunofluorescence.r" # 第一批荧光数据处理

#------------------------------#
# 基因表达与Aβ指数的相关性分析 #
#------------------------------#
source("script/load_checkpoint.r")

outdir <- "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence"
if (! dir.exists(outdir)){
  dir.create(outdir)
}

expr <- testcombo@expression$cell$rna$normalized@exprMat

library(parallel)

# sample <- "FADCtrl"
samples <- c("FADCtrl", "WTCtrl", "PLX5622")
for (sample in samples){
  infile <- file.path(outdir, "measurement", sample, "Results.ch02.reshaped.csv")
  measure <- read.csv(infile, row.names=1)
  measure$barcode <- paste0(sample, "_1-", measure$barcode)
  row.names(measure) <- measure$barcode
  barcode.inter <- intersect(measure$barcode, colnames(expr))
  measure.filt <- measure[barcode.inter, ]
  immuno.index <- measure.filt$Mean
  
  gene.list <- as.vector(row.names(expr))
  
  out.list <- mclapply(gene.list, function(gene){
    gene.expr <- expr[gene, measure.filt$barcode]
    cor.result <- cor.test(gene.expr, immuno.index, method="spearman", exact = FALSE)
    e <- cor.result$estimate
    p <- cor.result$p.value
    return(c(e, p))
  }, mc.cores=70)
  
  out.df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, out.list))
  names(out.df) <- c("rho", "pvalue")
  out.df$gene <- gene.list
  out.df$fdr <- p.adjust(out.df$pvalue)
  out.df <- out.df[order(out.df$pvalue), ]
  out.df.filt <- out.df[out.df$fdr < 0.05, ]
  
  out.path <- file.path(outdir, "measurement", sample, "cor.ch02.csv")
  write.csv(out.df, out.path)
  out.path <- file.path(outdir, "measurement", sample, "cor.ch02.filt.csv")
  write.csv(out.df.filt, out.path)
}
```

#### 第二批荧光数据处理
```{r eval=FALSE}
"010immunofluorescence2.r" # 第二批荧光数据处理
# 基因表达与Aβ指数的相关性分析

source("script/load_checkpoint.r")

outdir <- "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence"
if (! dir.exists(outdir)){
  dir.create(outdir)
}

expr <- testcombo@expression$cell$rna$normalized@exprMat

library(parallel)

batch <- "2"
batch_dir <- "batch2"

# sample <- "FADCtrl"
samples <- c("FADCtrl", "WTCtrl", "PLX5622")
for (sample in samples){
  infile <- file.path(outdir, batch_dir, sample, "Results.ch02.reshaped.csv")
  measure <- read.csv(infile, row.names=1)
  measure$barcode <- paste0(sample, "_", batch, "-", measure$barcode)
  row.names(measure) <- measure$barcode
  barcode.inter <- intersect(measure$barcode, colnames(expr))
  measure.filt <- measure[barcode.inter, ]
  immuno.index <- measure.filt$Mean
  
  gene.list <- as.vector(row.names(expr))
  
  out.list <- mclapply(gene.list, function(gene){
    gene.expr <- expr[gene, measure.filt$barcode]
    cor.result <- cor.test(gene.expr, immuno.index, method="spearman", exact = FALSE)
    e <- cor.result$estimate
    p <- cor.result$p.value
    return(c(e, p))
  }, mc.cores=70)
  
  out.df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, out.list))
  names(out.df) <- c("rho", "pvalue")
  out.df$gene <- gene.list
  out.df$fdr <- p.adjust(out.df$pvalue)
  out.df <- out.df[order(out.df$pvalue), ]
  out.df.filt <- out.df[out.df$fdr < 0.05, ]
  
  out.path <- file.path(outdir, batch_dir, sample, "cor.ch02.csv")
  write.csv(out.df, out.path)
  out.path <- file.path(outdir, batch_dir, sample, "cor.ch02.filt.csv")
  write.csv(out.df.filt, out.path)
}
```

#### 处理特有的PCGs（要求rho大于0.1）

方法1：对rho进行限制（\>0.1或大于0.5）

```{r eval=FALSE}
# "010immunofluorescence.two_batch.r" # 合并两批数据的结果

# 文件说明：
# measurement: batch1的每spot荧光强度表。
# batch2: batch2的每spot荧光强度表。
# merged.0.1：rho > 0.1为阈值的样品特有PIGs。
# merged.0.15: rho > 0.15为阈值的样品特有PIGs。

# 1. 读取相关性矩阵。
# 2. 获取处理特有的PIGs（两种方法）。
# 3. 通路富集分析、相关性图谱绘制。

outdir <- "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence"
samples <- c("FADCtrl", "WTCtrl", "PLX5622")

batch_dir <- "measurement"
df.list.1 <- lapply(samples, function(x){
  df <- read.csv(file.path(outdir, batch_dir, x, "cor.ch02.filt.csv"))
  df <- na.omit(df)
  return(df)
})
names(df.list.1) <- samples

batch_dir <- "batch2"
df.list.2 <- lapply(samples, function(x){
  df <- read.csv(file.path(outdir, batch_dir, x, "cor.ch02.filt.csv"))
  df <- na.omit(df)
  return(df)
})
names(df.list.2) <- samples

#--------------------#
# 处理特有的PIGs鉴定 # 
#--------------------#

# 怎样才算是处理特有？
# 1. 在该处理的两个样品中都有，而在其他处理的所有样品中都没有（最严格）。
# 2. 在该处理的两个样品中都有，而在其他处理中并非所有样品都有。
# 3. 在该处理的任意样品中有，而在其他处理的所有样品中都没有。

#----------------------------------------------#
# 方法1（而且还对rho进行了限制（>0.1或大于0.5））

# rho > 0.15 的基因
rho_cutoff <- 0.1
batch_dir <- "merged.0.1" # 输出目录

genes.up.list.1 <- lapply(df.list.1, function(x){
  return(x[x$rho > rho_cutoff, "gene"])
})
genes.up.list.2 <- lapply(df.list.2, function(x){
  return(x[x$rho > rho_cutoff, "gene"])
})

# 统计两个批次的交集。
genes.up.list <- list()
for (s in samples){
  gl.1 <- genes.up.list.1[[s]]
  gl.2 <- genes.up.list.2[[s]]
  gl.inter <- intersect(gl.1, gl.2)
  cat(s, length(gl.1), length(gl.2), length(gl.inter), "\n")
  genes.up.list[[s]] <- gl.inter
}

# 输出ivenn格式的文件，可以在http://www.interactivenn.net/中绘制韦恩图。
dir.create(file.path(outdir, batch_dir))
ivenn <- file(file.path(outdir, batch_dir, "PGIs.ivenn"), "w")
n <- 1
for (i in names(genes.up.list)){
  cat(i, ":", paste(genes.up.list[[i]], collapse=","), ";", sep="", file=ivenn)
  if (n < 3) cat("\n", file=ivenn)
  n <- n + 1
}
close(ivenn)

# 特有基因
unique_PIGs <- lapply(samples, function(x){
  gl <- genes.up.list[[x]]
  for (i in samples){
    if(i == x) next
    gl2 <- genes.up.list[[i]]
    gl <- setdiff(gl, gl2)
  }
  # 对特有基因根据pvaue进行排序。
  df <- df.list.1[[x]] # 假设df是已经按照pvalue排好序的。
  gl <- df[df$gene %in% gl, "gene"]
  return(gl)
})

names(unique_PIGs) <- samples
lapply(unique_PIGs, paste, collapse=",")

# 前10个特有基因。
unique_PIGs.top10 <- lapply(unique_PIGs, function(x){
  head(x, 9)
})

# 代表性PIGs（top10）的相关性散点图，使用batch1的来绘制。
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

expr <- testcombo@expression$cell$rna$normalized@exprMat
for (s in samples){
  infile <- file.path(outdir, "measurement", s, "Results.ch02.reshaped.csv")
  measure <- read.csv(infile, row.names=1)
  measure$barcode <- paste0(s, "_1-", measure$barcode)
  row.names(measure) <- measure$barcode
  barcode.inter <- intersect(measure$barcode, colnames(expr))
  measure.filt <- measure[barcode.inter, ]
  immuno.index <- measure.filt$Mean
  p.list <- list()
  for (gene in unique_PIGs.top10[[s]]){
    gene.expr <- expr[gene, measure.filt$barcode]
    data <- data.frame(plaque_index=immuno.index, gene.expr=gene.expr)
    # m <- lm(formula = gene.expr ~ plaque_index, data = data)
    # r <- summary(m)
    # r.square <- r$adj.r.squared
    rho <- df.list.1[[s]]$rho[df.list.1[[s]]$gene == gene]
    p <- ggplot(data, aes(plaque_index, gene.expr)) + geom_point() +
      stat_smooth(method = "lm") + ggtitle(gene) +
      annotate("text",  x=Inf, y = Inf, label = paste0("rho == ", rho),
        parse = TRUE, vjust=1, hjust=1)
    p.list[[gene]] <- p
  }
  pall <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=3)
  outfile <- file.path(outdir, batch_dir, s, paste0(s, ".PIGs_scatterPlot.png"))
  ggsave(outfile, pall, width=7, height=7)
}

# 处理特有PIGs的通路富集分析
out.file <- file(file.path(outdir, batch_dir, "treatment_specific_PIGs.txt"), "w")
for (s in samples){
  cat(s, "\t", paste(unique_PIGs[[s]], collapse=","), "\n", file=out.file, sep="")
}
close(out.file)

# PLX5622-specific 的PIGs在FADCtrl中的相关性情况。
df.AD1 <- df.list.1[["FADCtrl"]]
row.names(df.AD1) <- df.AD1$gene

df.AD2 <- df.list.2[["FADCtrl"]]
row.names(df.AD2) <- df.AD2$gene

df.PL1 <- df.list.1[["PLX5622"]]
row.names(df.PL1) <- df.PL1$gene

df.PL2 <- df.list.2[["PLX5622"]]
row.names(df.PL2) <- df.PL2$gene

gene.list <- "Atf4|Atp2a2|Myo5a|Nptn|Slc8a1|Bok|Clstn1|Atp2b1|Kctd17"
gene.list <- strsplit(gene.list, "\\|")[[1]]
gene.list[! gene.list %in% union(row.names(df.AD1), row.names(df.AD2))]

gene.list <- unique_PIGs[["FADCtrl"]]
df.AD1[gene.list, ]
df.AD2[gene.list, ]
df.PL1[gene.list, ]
df.PL2[gene.list, ]

gene.list[! gene.list %in% union(row.names(df.PL1), row.names(df.PL2))]
```

#### 方法2（不对rho进行限制）

```{r eval=FALSE}
#----------------------------------------------#
# 方法2（不对rho进行限制）

# 为了绘制共表达网络图，需要更多的基因。于是放宽筛选标准。不对rho进行限制，只要求FDR小于0.05。

# 先整理表格，一行是一个基因，包含这个基因在所有样品中与Aβ index的相关系数、pvalue。
# "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/batch2/PLX5622/cor.ch02.csv"
# gene,rho.WT1,fdr.WT1,rho.WT2,fdr.WT2,...

treatments <- c("FADCtrl", "WTCtrl", "PLX5622")

df.list <- list()
n <- 1
for (s in treatments){
  for (b in c("1", "2")){
    if (b == "1") {
      batch_dir <- "measurement"
      channel <- "ch02"
    }
    else {
      batch_dir <- "batch2"
      channel <- "ch02"
    }
    infile <- paste0("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/", batch_dir, "/", s, "/cor.", channel, ".csv")
    df1 <- read.csv(infile, row.names=1)
    df1 <- df1[, c("gene", "rho", "fdr")]
    df1$fdr[is.na(df1$fdr)] <- 1
    colnames(df1) <- c("gene", paste0("rho.", s, "_", b), paste0("fdr.", s, "_", b))
    df.list[[n]] <- df1
    n <- n + 1
  }
}

df.merged <- Reduce(function(x, y) {merge(x, y, by="gene")}, df.list)

batch_dir <- "merged" # 输出目录
dir.create("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged")

#-----------------------#
# 执行筛选。
# FADCtrl、PLX5622分别鉴定。
# 宽松的筛选标准：FDR < 0.05
FADCtrl.PCGs <- df.merged[df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_2 < 0.05, "gene"]
PLX5622.PCGs <- df.merged[df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_2 < 0.05, "gene"]

length(FADCtrl.PCGs)
# [1] 279
length(PLX5622.PCGs)
# [1] 457

# 稍严格的筛选标准：FDR < 0.05 & rho > 0.1
rho.cutoff <- 0.15
FADCtrl.PCGs <- df.merged[df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_1 < 0.05 &
                            df.merged$rho.FADCtrl_1 > rho.cutoff &
                            df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_2 < 0.05 &
                            df.merged$rho.FADCtrl_2 > rho.cutoff, "gene"]
PLX5622.PCGs <- df.merged[df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_1 < 0.05 &
                            df.merged$rho.PLX5622_1 > rho.cutoff &
                            df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_2 < 0.05 &
                            df.merged$rho.PLX5622_2 > rho.cutoff, "gene"]

# 处理特有的PCGs
# PLX5622 specific: 严格
condition2 <- (df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_1 >= 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_2 >= 0.05) & 
              (df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_2 < 0.05)

PLX5622_specific_PIGs <- df.merged[condition2, ]
PLX5622_specific_PIGs <- PLX5622_specific_PIGs[order(PLX5622_specific_PIGs$rho.PLX5622_1), ]
PLX5622_specific_PIGs <- subset(PLX5622_specific_PIGs, rho.PLX5622_1 * rho.PLX5622_2>0)
write.csv(PLX5622_specific_PIGs, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/PLX5622_specific_PIGs.csv")
PLX5622_specific_PIGs[PLX5622_specific_PIGs$rho.PLX5622_1 < 0, ] # 15个PIX5622特有的负相关基因，大部分为核糖体蛋白。
# 51个PIX5622特有的正相关基因

# FADCtrl specific: 严格
condition3 <- (df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_2 < 0.05) &
              (df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_1 >= 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_2 >= 0.05)

FADCtrl_specific_PIGs <- df.merged[condition3, ]
FADCtrl_specific_PIGs <- FADCtrl_specific_PIGs[order(FADCtrl_specific_PIGs$rho.FADCtrl_1), ]
nrow(FADCtrl_specific_PIGs) # 21，其中有9个基因是在两个个体中都是负相关的。Slc6a11, Ntrk2等基因都可以认为是被Aβ抑制了的基因，在药物处理后得到恢复。
FADCtrl_specific_PIGs <- subset(FADCtrl_specific_PIGs, rho.FADCtrl_1 * rho.FADCtrl_2>0) # 去掉rho方向相反的。

write.csv(FADCtrl_specific_PIGs, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/FADCtrl_specific_PIGs.csv")

# 分别获得PLX5622的PIGs和FADCtrl的PIGs，用于绘制韦恩图。
condition <- df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_2 < 0.05
FADCtrl_PIGs <- df.merged[condition, ]
condition <- df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_2 < 0.05
PLX5622_PIGs <- df.merged[condition, ]

library(VennDiagram)
 
# Generate 3 sets of 200 words
set1 <- FADCtrl_PIGs$gene
set2 <- PLX5622_PIGs$gene

# Prepare a palette of 3 colors with R colorbrewer:
library(RColorBrewer)
myCol <- brewer.pal(3, "Pastel2")[1:2]

# Chart
venn.diagram(
        x = list(set1, set2),
        category.names = c("FADCtrl PIGs" , "PLX5622 PIGs"),
        filename = '001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/venn_diagramm.png',
        imagetype = "png", 
        cat.pos = c(-30, 30), # 在绘制出来的图片的基础上面调整角度。与文档中的不一致。
        fill=c("lightgreen", "lightsalmon"),
        col=c("lightgreen",  "lightsalmon"),
        cat.col=c("green", "salmon")
)

#---------------------------------------------------#
# 主要看上面的结果。下面的结果只是探索性地分析一下。

# 所有样品共有的PIGs
condition1 <- df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_2 < 0.05 &
              df.merged$fdr.WTCtrl_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.WTCtrl_2 < 0.05 & 
              df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_2 < 0.05
common_PIGs <- df.merged[condition1, ]
common_PIGs <- common_PIGs[order(common_PIGs$rho.FADCtrl_1), ]
write.csv(common_PIGs, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/common_PIGs.csv")


# all PIGs
condition4 <- (df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_2 < 0.05) |
              (df.merged$fdr.WTCtrl_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.WTCtrl_2 < 0.05) | 
              (df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_2 < 0.05)

all_PIGs <- df.merged[condition4, ]
all_PIGs <- all_PIGs[order(all_PIGs$rho.FADCtrl_1), ]
all_PIGs  
write.csv(all_PIGs, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/all_PIGs.csv")

# PL and AD common PIGs
condition5 <- (df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.FADCtrl_2 < 0.05) &
              (df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_1 < 0.05 & df.merged$fdr.PLX5622_2 < 0.05)

PL_AD_common_PIGs <- df.merged[condition5, ]
PL_AD_common_PIGs <- PL_AD_common_PIGs[order(PL_AD_common_PIGs$rho.FADCtrl_1), ]
write.csv(PL_AD_common_PIGs, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/PL_AD_common_PIGs.csv")

# overlap between all_PIGs and ST rescued genes. 
# implemented in `script/003identify_DEGs.filter_DEGs.r`

# PL_AD_common_PIGs & spatial genes
AD.spatial <- readLines("001Giotto_out/005spatial_genes/spatial_gene/FADCtrl.txt")
PL.spatial <- readLines("001Giotto_out/005spatial_genes/spatial_gene/PLX5622.txt")
AD_PL_common_spatial <- union(AD.spatial, PL.spatial) # 194
PL_AD_common_spatial_PIGs <- intersect(AD_PL_common_spatial, PL_AD_common_PIGs$gene)
length(PL_AD_common_spatial_PIGs) # 192

# extract expression matrix
source("script/load_checkpoint.r")

# 要使用单独一个样品来构建网络，还是使用多个样品一起？
# 先试试多个样品一起。
expr <- get_expression_values(testcombo, values="normalized", output="matrix")
cells <- grep("PLX5622|FADCtrl", colnames(expr), value=T)
PL_AD_common_spatial_PIGs.expr <- expr[PL_AD_common_spatial_PIGs, cells]
PL_AD_common_spatial_PIGs.expr <- as.matrix(PL_AD_common_spatial_PIGs.expr)
write.csv(PL_AD_common_spatial_PIGs.expr, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/PL_AD_common_spatial_PIGs.expr.csv")


```

#### 散点图绘制及通路富集分析

```{r eval=FALSE}
# 代表性PIGs（top10）的相关性散点图，使用batch1的来绘制。

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

expr <- testcombo@expression$cell$rna$normalized@exprMat
for (s in samples){
  infile <- file.path(outdir, "measurement", s, "Results.ch02.reshaped.csv")
  measure <- read.csv(infile, row.names=1)
  measure$barcode <- paste0(s, "_1-", measure$barcode)
  row.names(measure) <- measure$barcode
  barcode.inter <- intersect(measure$barcode, colnames(expr))
  measure.filt <- measure[barcode.inter, ]
  immuno.index <- measure.filt$Mean
  p.list <- list()
  for (gene in unique_PIGs.top10[[s]]){
    gene.expr <- expr[gene, measure.filt$barcode]
    data <- data.frame(plaque_index=immuno.index, gene.expr=gene.expr)
    # m <- lm(formula = gene.expr ~ plaque_index, data = data)
    # r <- summary(m)
    # r.square <- r$adj.r.squared
    rho <- df.list.1[[s]]$rho[df.list.1[[s]]$gene == gene]
    p <- ggplot(data, aes(plaque_index, gene.expr)) + geom_point() +
      stat_smooth(method = "lm") + ggtitle(gene) +
      annotate("text",  x=Inf, y = Inf, label = paste0("rho == ", rho),
        parse = TRUE, vjust=1, hjust=1)
    p.list[[gene]] <- p
  }
  pall <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=3)
  outfile <- file.path(outdir, batch_dir, s, paste0(s, ".PIGs_scatterPlot.png"))
  ggsave(outfile, pall, width=7, height=7)
}

# 处理特有PIGs的通路富集分析
out.file <- file(file.path(outdir, batch_dir, "treatment_specific_PIGs.txt"), "w")
genes <- subset(PLX5622_specific_PIGs, rho.PLX5622_1 > 0, select=gene, drop=T)
cat("PLX5622.pos", "\t", paste(genes, collapse=","), "\n", file=out.file, sep="")
genes <- subset(PLX5622_specific_PIGs, rho.PLX5622_1 < 0, select=gene, drop=T)
cat("PLX5622.neg", "\t", paste(genes, collapse=","), "\n", file=out.file, sep="")
genes <- subset(FADCtrl_specific_PIGs, rho.FADCtrl_1 > 0, select=gene, drop=T)
cat("FADCtrl.pos", "\t", paste(genes, collapse=","), "\n", file=out.file, sep="")
genes <- subset(FADCtrl_specific_PIGs, rho.FADCtrl_1 < 0, select=gene, drop=T)
cat("FADCtrl.neg", "\t", paste(genes, collapse=","), "\n", file=out.file, sep="")
close(out.file)

genelist <- read.table(file.path(outdir, batch_dir, "treatment_specific_PIGs.txt"), sep="\t")

# 各处理的PCGs交集Venn图。263个PLX5622特有，85个FADCtrl特有；194个共有。

# 鉴定出了一些PLX5622特有的PIGs（Atf4|Atp2a2|Myo5a|Nptn|Slc8a1|Bok|Clstn1|Atp2b1|Kctd17），但是发现这些基因其实在FADCtrl.1里面也是PIG，只是在FADCtrl.2里面不是。所以这到底是随机的个体差异导致，还是真实的处理间差异，仍不清楚。
```

### PIGs

#### PIGs鉴定

Idea: Divide spots into 2 groups according to a Abeta index cutoff, and perform differential expression analysis.

Procedure:

1.  Set the cutoff and group spots
2.  differential expression analysis
3.  Compare between PLX5622 and WTCtrl

```{r eval=FALSE}

# ------------------------------- # 
# 目标：鉴定PIGs。
# 思路：把Aβ指数低的spot和Aβ指数高的spot进行差异表达分析，得到差异表达基因。
# 步骤：
# 1. 选取合适的斑块指数阈值
# 2. spot分组
# 3. FindMarkers差异表达分析
# 4. 比较不同批次、不同处理组之间的差异。

# ------------------------------- # 
# 执行分析
# ------------------------------- # 

# 加载Giotto对象
source("script/load_checkpoint.r")

meta <- pDataDT(testcombo)

samples <- c("FADCtrl_1", "FADCtrl_2", "WTCtrl_1", 
             "WTCtrl_2", "PLX5622_1", "PLX5622_2")

measure.list <- list()
n <- 1
for (sample in samples){
  # 读取Abeta index数据
  treatment <- strsplit(sample, "_")[[1]][1]
  batch <- strsplit(sample, "_")[[1]][2]
  if (batch=="1"){
    infile <- file.path("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence", 
                        "measurement", 
                        treatment, "Results.ch02.reshaped.csv")
  } else if (batch=="2"){
    infile <- file.path("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence",
                        "batch2", 
                        treatment, "Results.ch02.reshaped.csv")
  }
  
  measure <- read.csv(infile, row.names=1)
  # 把Abeta index合并到metadata中。
  
  measure$barcode <- paste0(sample, "-", measure$barcode)
  row.names(measure) <- measure$barcode
  measure.list[[n]] <- measure
  n <- n + 1
}
measure.df <- do.call(rbind, measure.list)

meta <- testcombo@cell_metadata$cell$rna@metaDT
testcombo@cell_metadata$cell$rna@metaDT$Abeta_index <- measure.df[meta$cell_ID, "Mean"]
meta <- testcombo@cell_metadata$cell$rna@metaDT

write.csv(meta, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta.csv")

# 探索合适的Abeta index阈值
library(ggplot2)
outdir <- "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/PIG"
dir.create(outdir)
# 绘制Abeta分布图。
p <- ggplot(meta, aes(x=Abeta_index)) + 
  geom_histogram(binwidth=2) + 
  facet_wrap(.~list_ID, ncol=2)
ggsave(paste0("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/PIG/", 
              "Abeta.hist.png"), p, width=8, height=6)

# 探索不同Abeta index阈值筛选下，保留的spot比例。
for(cutoff in seq(1, 30, 1)){
  keep.ratio <- nrow(meta[meta$Abeta_index > cutoff, ])/nrow(meta)
  cat("cutoff:", cutoff, "keep ratio:", keep.ratio, "\n")
}

testcombo@cell_metadata$cell$rna@metaDT$sdimx <- testcombo@spatial_locs$cell$raw@coordinates$sdimx
testcombo@cell_metadata$cell$rna@metaDT$sdimy <- testcombo@spatial_locs$cell$raw@coordinates$sdimy

# 把点图绘制出来看看。
  # 绘制带轮廓的点：
  # 1. 使用大小不一样的点，重叠在一起。
  # 2. 同时指定fill和color
  # 3. 使用shap=21
meta <- pDataDT(testcombo)

for (Abeta_index_cutoff in c(1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 10)){
  # Abeta_index_cutoff <- 10
  meta$Abeta_pos <- ifelse(meta$Abeta_index > Abeta_index_cutoff, 
                          yes = "pos", no="neg")
  p <- ggplot(meta[meta$treatment != "WTCtrl", ], aes(sdimx, sdimy)) + 
    # geom_point(aes(color=cell_types), size=1.1) + 
    # scale_color_discrete() + 
    geom_point(aes(color=Abeta_pos), size=1) + 
    scale_color_manual(values = c(pos="red", neg="white")) + 
    facet_wrap(.~list_ID, ncol=2, scales="free") + 
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1.5))) + 
    theme(strip.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold"), 
          legend.title = element_text(size = 12), 
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12))
  out.file <- paste0("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/PIG/Aeta.dot.", 
                     Abeta_index_cutoff, ".png")
  ggsave(out.file, p, width=8, height=8)
}

Abeta_index_cutoff <- 10
meta$Abeta_pos <- ifelse(meta$Abeta_index > Abeta_index_cutoff, 
                          yes = "pos", no="neg")

# 差异表达分析
# lfc.cutoff <- 0.1
for (lfc.cutoff in c(0, 0.1, 0.2)){
  PIGs.list <- list()
  for (sample in samples){
    cat("sample:", sample, "\n")
    gobj <- subsetGiotto(testcombo, 
                         cell_ids=meta[meta$list_ID == sample, ][["cell_ID"]])
    r <- findScranMarkers(gobj, group_1="pos", 
                          group_2="neg", cluster_column="Abeta_pos", 
                          test.type="wilcox", lfc=lfc.cutoff, direction="up")
    # 关于这个findScranMarkers结果的解释，参考onenote笔记《理解scran::findMarkers》
    r1 <- r[sapply(r, function(x){x$cluster[1]=="pos"})][[1]]
    r1 <- r1[r1$FDR < 0.05, ]
    # PIGs <- r1[r1$FDR < 0.05, ][["feats"]] # 在lfc=0.1下，有21个PIGs。
    r1$sample <- sample
    PIGs.list[[sample]] <- r1
  }
  
  PIGs.df <- do.call(rbind, PIGs.list)
  out.file <- paste0("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/PIG/PIGs.lfc_", 
                     lfc.cutoff, ".csv")
  write.csv(PIGs.df, out.file)
}

```

#### 处理特有的PIGs

```{r eval=FALSE}
#-------------------------------# 
# 取FADCtrl和PLX5622的交集 
PIGs.df <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/PIG/PIGs.lfc_0.1.csv", row.names=1)
FADCtrl.PIGs <- intersect(PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="FADCtrl_1", "feats"], 
                     PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="FADCtrl_2", "feats"])
PLX5622.PIGs <- intersect(PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="PLX5622_1", "feats"], 
                     PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="PLX5622_2", "feats"])
WTCtrl.PIGs <- intersect(PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="WTCtrl_1", "feats"], 
                     PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="WTCtrl_2", "feats"])
length(FADCtrl.PIGs)
length(PLX5622.PIGs)
PL.inter.AD <- intersect(FADCtrl.PIGs, PLX5622.PIGs)
FADCtrl.specific <- setdiff(FADCtrl.PIGs, PLX5622.PIGs)
PLX5622.specific <- setdiff(PLX5622.PIGs, FADCtrl.PIGs)

#-------------------------------# 
# 与ST DEGs的overlap
# 读取空间转录组DEGs文件，并整理成比较容易处理的格式。
DEGs <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/wilcox.each_cell.log2fc_0.3.csv", row.names=1)

# 把一行一个genelist改成一行一个基因。
from_multiGenelist <- function(DEGs){
  DEGs <- DEGs[DEGs$geneList != "", ]
  DEGs2.list <- lapply(1:nrow(DEGs), function(x){
    gene.list <- strsplit(DEGs[x, "geneList"], ";")[[1]]
    gene.n <- length(gene.list)
    data.frame(gene=gene.list, 
               cellType=rep(DEGs[x, "cellType"], gene.n), 
               comparison=rep(DEGs[x, "comparison"], gene.n),
               direction=rep(DEGs[x, "direction"], gene.n))
  })
  DEGs2 <- do.call(rbind, DEGs2.list)
  return(DEGs2)
}
# 找出PIGs与DEGs的交集。
intersect(DEGs2$gene, FADCtrl.specific)
intersect(DEGs2$gene, PL.inter.AD)
DEGs2[DEGs2$gene %in% PLX5622.specific, ]

#-------------------------------# 

# PIGs与PCGs的交集(LFC > 0)。
AD.PIG.inter.PCG <- intersect(FADCtrl.PIGs, FADCtrl.PCGs)
PL.PIG.inter.PCG <- intersect(PLX5622.PIGs, PLX5622.PCGs)
length(AD.PIG.inter.PCG) # 105
length(PL.PIG.inter.PCG) # 270
length(setdiff(FADCtrl.PIGs, FADCtrl.PCGs))
length(setdiff(FADCtrl.PCGs, FADCtrl.PIGs))
length(setdiff(PLX5622.PIGs, PLX5622.PCGs))
length(setdiff(PLX5622.PCGs, PLX5622.PIGs))

length(AD.PIG.inter.PCG) # 105
length(PL.PIG.inter.PCG) # 270

#-------------------------------# 
# 读取单细胞转录组DEGs文件，并整理成比较容易处理的格式。
library(Rvenn)

DEGs.sc <- read.csv("../002SC/001Seurat_out/004DEGs/wilcox/wilcox.each_cell.log2fc_0.2.csv", row.names=1)
DEGs.sc2 <- from_multiGenelist(DEGs.sc)
DEGs.sc2 <- aggregate(cellType~gene+comparison+direction, function(x){paste(x, collapse=";")}, data=DEGs.sc2)
DEGs.sc2 <- DEGs.sc2[order(DEGs.sc2$gene), ]

# 只显示重叠的基因
intersect(PL.inter.AD, DEGs.sc2$gene)
intersect(FADCtrl.specific, DEGs.sc2$gene)
intersect(PLX5622.specific, DEGs.sc2$gene)

# 显示重叠的基因，也显示基因的差异表达信息。
DEGs.sc2[DEGs.sc2$gene %in% PL.inter.AD, ]
DEGs.sc2[DEGs.sc2$gene %in% FADCtrl.specific, ]
DEGs.sc2[DEGs.sc2$gene %in% PLX5622.specific, ]
```

#### 给图片上色

```{r}

PIGs.df <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/PIG/PIGs.lfc_0.1.csv", row.names=1)
FADCtrl.PIGs <- intersect(PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="FADCtrl_1", "feats"], 
                     PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="FADCtrl_2", "feats"])
PLX5622.PIGs <- intersect(PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="PLX5622_1", "feats"], 
                     PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="PLX5622_2", "feats"])
WTCtrl.PIGs <- intersect(PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="WTCtrl_1", "feats"], 
                     PIGs.df[PIGs.df$sample=="WTCtrl_2", "feats"])
length(FADCtrl.PIGs)
length(PLX5622.PIGs)
PL.inter.AD <- intersect(FADCtrl.PIGs, PLX5622.PIGs)
FADCtrl.specific <- setdiff(FADCtrl.PIGs, PLX5622.PIGs)
PLX5622.specific <- setdiff(PLX5622.PIGs, FADCtrl.PIGs)

st.DEGs <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/st.DEGs.csv", row.names=1)
sc.DEGs <- read.csv("001Seurat_out/004DEGs/wilcox/sc.DEGs.csv", row.names=1)

for (i in PL.inter.AD) {
  df <- subset(st.DEGs, gene==i)
  df <- df[order(df$comparison), ]
  if (nrow(df) > 0){
    print(df)
  }
  cat ("\n")
}

for (i in PL.inter.AD) {
  df <- subset(sc.DEGs, gene==i)
  df <- df[order(df$comparison), ]
  if (nrow(df) > 0){
    print(df)
  }
  cat ("\n")
}

```


**结果：**

(ref:PIGsIntersection) Intersection of PLX5622 and FADCtrl PIGs（LFC\>0.1）. 蓝点代表该基因属于SC分析中得到的DEGs，红点代表基因属于ST分析中的DEGs。

```{r PIGsIntersection, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="(ref:PIGsIntersection)"}
knitr::include_graphics("data/st/010/PIGs_intersection.png")
```

**结果描述：**

-   PIGs result is consistent to PCGs result.

-   PIGs result is consistent to ST DEGs.

-   Many microglia related genes are ADCtrl PIGs but not PXL5622 PIGs.

Snap25是一个突触相关基因，被用于衡量谷氨酸盐的释放程度[@deceglia2023]。如何解释Snap25在药物处理后与Abeta相关性上升？

与斑块关联的基因似乎发生了变化，小胶质细胞是单纯地表达下降了，还是同时功能也发生了变化？

PLX5622中的特有PIGs是小胶特有的吗？还是说是星胶或者其他细胞类型特有的？

可以检查一下这些基因在不同样品中的pvalue排名。找出排名差异大的。

## 5 Aβ与各细胞类型的联系

### 5.1 Aβ与小胶质细胞

#### Aβ与HOM/DAM的相关性

```{r eval=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
expr <- testcombo@expression$cell$rna$normalized@exprMat
meta <- pDataDT(testcombo)
DAM.markers <- c("Trem2", "Tyrobp", "Lpl", "Apoe", "Ctsd")
HOM.markers <- c("P2ry12", "Tmem119", "Cx3cr1", "Cd33")
expr.df <- data.frame(t(as.matrix(expr[c(DAM.markers, HOM.markers), ])))
meta.sub <- cbind(meta[, c("list_ID", "treatment", "cell_types", "Abeta_index", "batch")], expr.df)

for (s in c("PLX5622_1", "PLX5622_2", "FADCtrl_1", "FADCtrl_2")){
  print(s)
  df <- meta.sub[meta.sub$list_ID==s, ]
  r <- cor.test(df$Trem2, df$Abeta_index, method="spearman")
  print(r)
  r <- cor.test(df$Tmem119, df$Abeta_index, method="spearman")
  print(r)
}

# 两个批次分开
p <- ggplot(meta.sub, aes(Abeta_index, Trem2, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(method="lm") + facet_grid(.~batch)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/DAM_and_Abeta.png", p, width=7, height=3)

p <- ggplot(meta.sub, aes(Abeta_index, Tmem119, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(method="lm") + facet_grid(.~batch)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/Tmem119_and_Abeta.png", p, width=7, height=3)

# 合并两个批次
for (treat in c("5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX")) {
  cat("treatment:", treat, "\n")
  df <- subset(meta.sub, treatment==treat)
  x <- cor.test(df$Tmem119, df$Abeta_index, method="spearman")
  cat("gene: Tmem119\n")
  cat("ρ:", x$estimate, "\n")
  cat("p:", x$p.value, "\n")
  x <- cor.test(df$Trem2, df$Abeta_index, method="spearman")
  cat("gene: Trem2\n")
  cat("ρ:", x$estimate, "\n")
  cat("p:", x$p.value, "\n")
  cat("\n")
}

meta.sub <- subset(meta.sub, treatment %in% c("PLX5622", "FADCtrl"))
mapping <- c("PLX5622"="5xFAD-PLX", "FADCtrl"="5xFAD-CTRL")
meta.sub$treatment <- mapping[meta.sub$treatment]
meta.sub2<- meta.sub[, c("Abeta_index", "treatment", "Trem2", "Tmem119")]
meta.sub2 <- melt(meta.sub2, id.vars=c("Abeta_index", "treatment"),
                  variable.name="gene", value.name="expr")

group.colors <- c("5xFAD-CTRL"="#d95f02", "5xFAD-PLX"="#1b9e77")

p <- ggplot(meta.sub2, aes(Abeta_index, expr, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_point(size=0.2) + geom_smooth(method="lm") + 
  scale_color_manual(values=group.colors) + 
  facet_grid(.~gene) + 
  theme(text=element_text(family="Arial"), panel.background=element_blank())
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/DAM_and_Abeta2.png", p, width=4, height=2)

```


#### Aβ index与HOM/DAM ratio

为了验证药物处理后DAM是否更加富集于Aβ附近，分别计算PL和AD组中HOM:DAM ratio与Aβ index的相关系数，比较其大小。

如果直接比较DAM与Aβ的相关系数，由于PL中小胶的信号普遍较弱，PL组很可能会相关系数很低。使用HOM:DAM相当于把DAM与Aβ的相关性进行标准化了，使得两个处理之间可比性更强。

```{r eval=FALSE}

# 1. 按照“PIGs鉴定”中的代码读取Aβ index
# 2. 根据treatment、brain regions对Aβ index以及Thy1、Trem2、Tmem119进行分类汇总。
# 3. 绘制散点图，计算相关系数。
library(ggplot2)
expr <- testcombo@expression$cell$rna$normalized@exprMat

#---------------------------------------------------------
# 直接计算DAM~Aβ
DAM.markers <- c("Trem2", "Tyrobp", "Lpl", "Apoe", "Ctsd")
HOM.markers <- c("P2ry12", "Tmem119", "Cx3cr1", "Cd33")
expr.df <- data.frame(t(as.matrix(expr[c(DAM.markers, HOM.markers), ])))
meta.sub <- cbind(meta[, c("treatment", "cell_types", "Abeta_index", "batch")], expr.df)

# 把几个marker的值合起来或许检测灵敏度会高一些？
# Apoe的表达量比较高，看看Apoe和Trem2的相关系数如何。看来Apoe和Trem2的相关系数不是很高。
# 所以还是不能用Apoe和Lpl来代表DAM。
cor.test(meta.sub$Trem2, meta.sub$Apoe, method="spearman") # 0.148
cor.test(meta.sub$Trem2, meta.sub$Tyrobp, method="spearman") # 0.42
cor.test(meta.sub$Trem2, meta.sub$Ctsd, method="spearman") # 0.42
cor.test(meta.sub$Trem2, meta.sub$Lpl, method="spearman") # 0.13
DAM.markers <- c("Trem2", "Tyrobp", "Ctsd")

# 查看几个HOM markers之间的相关系数。
cor.test(meta.sub$P2ry12, meta.sub$Tmem119, method="spearman") # 0.167
cor.test(meta.sub$P2ry12, meta.sub$Cx3cr1, method="spearman") # 0.173
cor.test(meta.sub$P2ry12, meta.sub$Cd33, method="spearman") # 0.07
HOM.markers <- c("P2ry12", "Tmem119", "Cx3cr1")

meta.sub <- data.frame(meta.sub)
meta.sub$DAM_index <- rowSums(meta.sub[, DAM.markers])
meta.sub$HOM_index <- rowSums(meta.sub[, HOM.markers])

meta.sub$DAM_HOM_ratio <- meta.sub$DAM_index / meta.sub$HOM_index

# cor.test(meta.sub$DAM_index, meta.sub$Abeta_index, method="spearman")
p <- ggplot(meta.sub, aes(Abeta_index, DAM_index, color=treatment)) + 
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(method="lm") + facet_grid(.~batch)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_DAM_index.png", p, width=7, height=3)

#---------------------------------------------------
# 计算(DAM:HOM)~Aβ
expr.df <- data.frame(t(as.matrix(expr[c("Thy1", "Trem2", "Tmem119"), ])))
meta.sub <- cbind(meta[, c("treatment", "cell_types", "Abeta_index", "batch")], expr.df)
meta.agg <- aggregate(.~treatment+batch+cell_types, FUN=mean, data=meta.sub)
meta.agg$DAM_HOM_ratio <- meta.agg$Trem2 / meta.agg$Tmem119

# 各脑区的DAM:HOM ratio比较。主要是比较Fiber tract的DAM_HOM ratio在PL vs AD中的差异。
p <- ggplot(meta.agg, aes(cell_types, DAM_HOM_ratio)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill=treatment), position="dodge") +
  facet_grid(batch~.) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=30))
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_DAM_HOM_ratio_each_region.png", p, width=7, height=6)



mycolorcode = c("Isocortex"="#666666",
                "Fiber tracts"="#E7298A",
                "Thalamus"="#FF7F00",
                "Olfactory area"="#E41A1C",
                "Hypothalamus"="#377EB8",
                "Hippocampus"="#4DAF4A",
                "Cortical subplate"="#A65628",
                "Meninges"="#80B1D3",
                "Striatum"="#B3DE69",
                "Lateral Ventricle"="#D9D9D9",
                "Third Ventricle"="#BC80BD",
                "C12"="#FFED6F")



# 两个批次分开
meta.agg.filt <- subset(meta.agg, !cell_types %in% c("Lateral Ventricle", "Meninges", "Fiber tracts")) #这两个脑区假荧光信号很多，去掉。
# fiber tract 的DAM:HOM ratio异常地高，去掉试试。如果去掉Fiber tracts，那pvalue就小多了。
# 可是没有合适的理由把这个脑区去掉。Fiber tracts的高DAM:HOM ratio或许有很大的生物学意义。首先我们在SC中观察到Oligo的表达发生了很多变化，此外，在药物处理后，Fiber tracts下降的Aβ指数也多。
library(ggrepel)
p <- ggplot(meta.agg.filt, aes(Abeta_index, DAM_HOM_ratio)) + 
  stat_smooth(aes(color=treatment), method="lm") + 
  # scale_color_manual(values=mycolorcode) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=treatment)) + 
  geom_text_repel(aes(label=cell_types)) + 
  facet_grid(.~batch)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_DAM_HOM_ratio.png", p, width=7, height=3)

# 计算相关系数
Batch <- 1
PL.Abeta <- subset(meta.agg.filt, treatment=="PLX5622" & batch==Batch,
                   select="Abeta_index", drop=T)
AD.Abeta <- subset(meta.agg.filt, treatment=="FADCtrl" & batch==Batch, 
                   select="Abeta_index", drop=T)
PL.ratio <- subset(meta.agg.filt, treatment=="PLX5622" & batch==Batch, 
                   select="DAM_HOM_ratio", drop=T)
AD.ratio <- subset(meta.agg.filt, treatment=="FADCtrl" & batch==Batch, 
                   select="DAM_HOM_ratio", drop=T)
PL.cor <- cor.test(PL.Abeta, PL.ratio, method="spearman") # b1: rho=0.5166667, p-value=0.1618; b2: 0.5166667, 0.1618
AD.cor <- cor.test(AD.Abeta, AD.ratio, method="spearman") # b1: rho=0.8, p=0.01383; b2: 0.6833333, 0.05032
# 使用lm
m <- lm(PL.ratio~PL.Abeta)
summary(m) # b1: Estimate=0.5580, p=0.3177; b2: 0.3500, 0.224
m <- lm(AD.ratio~AD.Abeta)
summary(m) # b1: Estimate=0.18889, p=0.02338; b2: 0.10090, 0.0837

# 两个批次合并
meta.agg2 <- aggregate(cbind(DAM_HOM_ratio, Abeta_index)~treatment+cell_types, FUN=mean, data=meta.agg)
meta.agg2.filt <- subset(meta.agg2, !cell_types %in% c("Lateral Ventricle", "Meninges")) #这两个脑区假荧光信号很多，去掉。
p <- ggplot(meta.agg2.filt, aes(Abeta_index, DAM_HOM_ratio, color=treatment)) + 
  stat_smooth(method="lm") + 
  geom_point()
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_DAM_HOM_ratio2.png", p, width=4, height=3)
# 计算相关系数
PL.Abeta <- subset(meta.agg2.filt, treatment=="PLX5622", select="Abeta_index", drop=T)
AD.Abeta <- subset(meta.agg2.filt, treatment=="FADCtrl", select="Abeta_index", drop=T)
PL.ratio <- subset(meta.agg2.filt, treatment=="PLX5622", select="DAM_HOM_ratio", drop=T)
AD.ratio <- subset(meta.agg2.filt, treatment=="FADCtrl", select="DAM_HOM_ratio", drop=T)
PL.cor <- cor.test(PL.Abeta, PL.ratio, method="spearman") # p=0.02549, rho=0.75
# 使用lm
m <- lm(PL.ratio~PL.Abeta)
summary(m) # e=0.4888, p=0.213
m <- lm(AD.ratio~AD.Abeta)
summary(m) # e=0.1487, p=0.01815

# 绘制脑区热图


# 使用Thy1代替Abeta index，三条线都是平的。
meta.agg2 <- aggregate(cbind(DAM_HOM_ratio, Thy1)~treatment+cell_types, FUN=mean, data=meta.agg)
meta.agg2.filt <- subset(meta.agg2, !cell_types %in% c("Lateral Ventricle", "Meninges")) #这两个脑区假荧光信号很多，去掉。
p <- ggplot(meta.agg2.filt, aes(Thy1, DAM_HOM_ratio, color=treatment)) + 
  stat_smooth(method="lm") + 
  geom_point()
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_DAM_HOM_ratio2.Thy1.png", p, width=7, height=3)

#----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 对每个spot进行分析
# 这样就可能出现很多表达量为0的spots，把这些spots直接去掉应该影响不大。
meta.sub.filt <- subset(meta.sub, Thy1!=0 & Trem2!=0 & Tmem119!=0 & Abeta_index!=0)
meta.sub.filt$DAM_HOM_ratio <- meta.sub.filt$Trem2 / meta.sub.filt$Tmem119
meta.sub.filt <- subset(meta.sub.filt, !cell_types %in% c("Lateral Ventricle", "Meninges"))
p <- ggplot(meta.sub.filt, aes(Abeta_index, DAM_HOM_ratio, color=treatment)) + 
  stat_smooth(method="lm") + 
  geom_point() + facet_grid(.~batch)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_DAM_HOM_ratio.all_spots.png", p, width=7, height=3)

# 使用Thy1代替Abeta index，效果似乎不好。
p <- ggplot(meta.sub.filt, aes(Thy1, DAM_HOM_ratio, color=treatment)) + 
  stat_smooth(method="lm") + 
  geom_point() + facet_grid(.~batch)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_DAM_HOM_ratio.all_spots.Thy1.png", p, width=7, height=3)



```

**结果：**

```{r comp-DAM-Abeta-cor, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="The DAM:HOM ratio increases quicker as Aβ increase in PL. Each point means a brain region. Meninges and Lateral Ventricle are removed because they have much more false fluorescent signal. The two panels are corresponding to the two batch. "}
knitr::include_graphics("data/st/010/compare_DAM_HOM_ratio.png")
```

#### Aβ~Aβ decrease rate

计算每个脑区的平均Aβ指数下降值，调查该下降值与脑区原来的Aβ指数的关系。

```{r eval=FALSE}

meta.agg <- aggregate(Abeta_index~treatment+batch+cell_types, FUN=mean, data=meta)
meta.agg <- meta.agg[meta.agg$cell_types != "C12", ]
meta.agg.pl <- meta.agg[meta.agg$treatment == "PLX5622", ]
meta.agg.ad <- meta.agg[meta.agg$treatment == "FADCtrl", ]
colnames(meta.agg.pl) <- sub("Abeta_index", "Abeta_index.PL", colnames(meta.agg.pl))
colnames(meta.agg.ad) <- sub("Abeta_index", "Abeta_index.AD", colnames(meta.agg.ad))
meta.agg2 <- merge(meta.agg.pl, meta.agg.ad, by=c("batch", "cell_types"))
meta.agg2$delta_Abeta <- meta.agg2$Abeta_index.AD - meta.agg2$Abeta_index.PL

p <- ggplot(meta.agg2, aes(Abeta_index.AD, delta_Abeta)) + geom_point() +
  geom_point(data=subset(meta.agg2, cell_types=="Fiber tracts"), 
             aes(Abeta_index.AD, delta_Abeta), color="red") + 
  geom_text_repel(data=subset(meta.agg2, cell_types=="Fiber tracts"),
                  aes(Abeta_index.AD, delta_Abeta, label=cell_types), 
                  min.segment.length = 1, nudge_x = 0.1, direction = "y") + 
  geom_smooth(method="lm") + facet_grid(.~batch)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_Abeta_decrease_rate.png", p, width=7, height=3)

# 计算相关系数、lm
delta_Abeta.1 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="1", select="delta_Abeta", drop=T)
delta_Abeta.2 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="2", select="delta_Abeta", drop=T)
Abeta_index.1 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="1", select="Abeta_index.AD", drop=T)
Abeta_index.2 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="2", select="Abeta_index.AD", drop=T)
m <- lm(delta_Abeta.1 ~ Abeta_index.1)
summary(m) # e=0.50531, p=0.00232
m <- lm(delta_Abeta.2 ~ Abeta_index.2)
summary(m) # e=0.3666, p=0.294

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 直接计算Aβ下降值与DAM的相关性。
meta.agg <- aggregate(cbind(Abeta_index, Trem2)~treatment+batch+cell_types, FUN=mean, data=meta.sub)
meta.agg <- meta.agg[meta.agg$cell_types != "C12", ]
meta.agg.pl <- meta.agg[meta.agg$treatment == "PLX5622", ]
meta.agg.ad <- meta.agg[meta.agg$treatment == "FADCtrl", ]
colnames(meta.agg.pl) <- c("treatment", "batch", "cell_types", "Abeta_index.PL", "Trem2.PL")
colnames(meta.agg.ad) <- c("treatment", "batch", "cell_types", "Abeta_index.AD", "Trem2.AD")
meta.agg2 <- merge(meta.agg.pl, meta.agg.ad, by=c("batch", "cell_types"))
meta.agg2$delta_Abeta <- meta.agg2$Abeta_index.AD - meta.agg2$Abeta_index.PL

delta_Abeta.1 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="1", select="delta_Abeta", drop=T)
delta_Abeta.2 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="2", select="delta_Abeta", drop=T)
Trem2.1 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="1", select="Trem2.PL", drop=T)
Trem2.2 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="2", select="Trem2.PL", drop=T)
m <- lm(delta_Abeta.1 ~ Trem2.1)
summary(m) # e=2.831, p=0.616
m <- lm(delta_Abeta.2 ~ Trem2.2)
summary(m) # e=35.462, p=0.08422

p <- ggplot(meta.agg2, aes(Trem2.PL, delta_Abeta)) + geom_point() +
  geom_point(data=subset(meta.agg2, cell_types=="Fiber tracts"), 
             aes(Trem2.PL, delta_Abeta), color="red") + 
  geom_text_repel(data=subset(meta.agg2, cell_types=="Fiber tracts"),
                  aes(Trem2.PL, delta_Abeta, label=cell_types), 
                  min.segment.length = 1, nudge_x = 0.1, direction = "y") + 
  geom_smooth(method="lm") + facet_grid(.~batch)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_Abeta_decrease_rate_Trem2.png", p, width=7, height=3)

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 计算Aβ下降值与DAM:HOM ratio的相关性。
meta.agg <- aggregate(cbind(Abeta_index, Trem2, Tmem119)~treatment+batch+cell_types, FUN=mean, data=meta.sub)
meta.agg <- meta.agg[meta.agg$cell_types != "C12", ]
meta.agg.pl <- meta.agg[meta.agg$treatment == "PLX5622", ]
meta.agg.ad <- meta.agg[meta.agg$treatment == "FADCtrl", ]
colnames(meta.agg.pl) <- c("treatment", "batch", "cell_types", "Abeta_index.PL", "Trem2.PL", "Tmem119.PL")
colnames(meta.agg.ad) <- c("treatment", "batch", "cell_types", "Abeta_index.AD", "Trem2.AD", "Tmem119.AD")
meta.agg2 <- merge(meta.agg.pl, meta.agg.ad, by=c("batch", "cell_types"))
meta.agg2$delta_Abeta <- meta.agg2$Abeta_index.AD - meta.agg2$Abeta_index.PL
meta.agg2$HOM_DAM_ratio <- meta.agg2$Trem2.PL / meta.agg2$Tmem119.PL
  
delta_Abeta.1 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="1", select="delta_Abeta", drop=T)
delta_Abeta.2 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="2", select="delta_Abeta", drop=T)
HOM_DAM_ratio.1 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="1", select="HOM_DAM_ratio", drop=T)
HOM_DAM_ratio.2 <- subset(meta.agg2, batch=="2", select="HOM_DAM_ratio", drop=T)
m <- lm(delta_Abeta.1 ~ HOM_DAM_ratio.1)
summary(m) # e=-0.1550, p=0.4555
m <- lm(delta_Abeta.2 ~ HOM_DAM_ratio.2)
summary(m) # e=1.4928, p=0.0110

p <- ggplot(meta.agg2, aes(HOM_DAM_ratio, delta_Abeta)) + geom_point() +
  geom_point(data=subset(meta.agg2, cell_types=="Fiber tracts"), 
             aes(HOM_DAM_ratio, delta_Abeta), color="red") + 
  geom_text_repel(data=subset(meta.agg2, cell_types=="Fiber tracts"),
                  aes(HOM_DAM_ratio, delta_Abeta, label=cell_types), 
                  min.segment.length = 1, nudge_x = 0.1, direction = "y") + 
  geom_smooth(method="lm") + facet_grid(.~batch)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_Abeta_decrease_rate_HOM_DAM_ratio.png", p, width=7, height=3)

# 结果表明，两个批次的差异比较大。batch1中delta Aβ与DAM:HOM ratio没有显著关系；而在batch2中，delta Aβ与DAM_HOM_ratio呈正相关。
```

**结果：**

```{r comp-Abeta-decreate-rate, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="The brain regions that have higher mean Abeta index, also have a higher A beta decrease rate. This may suggest that the clearance efficiency is improved by DAM redistribution. "}
knitr::include_graphics("data/st/010/compare_Abeta_decrease_rate.png")
```

比较Aβ多的区域的DAM的表达量与Aβ少的区域的表达量的倍数差异。

```{r}
# 使用“处理特有的PIGs”中的meta
DAM.markers <- c("Trem2", "Tyrobp", "Ctsd")
HOM.markers <- c("P2ry12", "Tmem119", "Cx3cr1")
expr.df <- data.frame(t(as.matrix(expr[c(DAM.markers, HOM.markers), ])))
meta <- data.frame(meta)
meta.sub <- cbind(meta[, c("treatment", "cell_types", "Abeta_index", "batch", "Abeta_pos")], expr.df)
meta.agg <- aggregate(cbind(Trem2, Tyrobp, Ctsd, P2ry12, Tmem119, Cx3cr1)~treatment+batch+Abeta_pos, FUN=mean, data=meta.sub)
meta.agg$DAM_HOM_ratio <- meta.agg$Trem2 / meta.agg$Tmem119
meta.agg.PL <- subset(meta.agg, treatment=="PLX5622")
meta.agg.AD <- subset(meta.agg, treatment=="FADCtrl")

# Abeta pos DAM vs Abeta neg DAM 
# PL, batch2
Batch=2
a <- subset(meta.agg.PL, batch==Batch & Abeta_pos=="pos", select="Trem2", drop=T)
b <- subset(meta.agg.PL, batch==Batch & Abeta_pos=="neg", select="Trem2", drop=T)
print(a/b)
a <- subset(meta.agg.AD, batch==Batch & Abeta_pos=="pos", select="Trem2", drop=T)
b <- subset(meta.agg.AD, batch==Batch & Abeta_pos=="neg", select="Trem2", drop=T)
print(a/b)

# batch1: 1.627093, 1.751701
# batch2: 1.763059, 1.630209
# 并没有明显的差异。

pl <- c(1.627093, 1.763059)
ad <- c(1.751701, 1.630209)
t.test(ad, pl, paired=T)

# Abeta pos DAM:HOM vs Abeta neg DAM:HOM
Batch=1
a <- subset(meta.agg.PL, batch==Batch & Abeta_pos=="pos", select="DAM_HOM_ratio", drop=T)
b <- subset(meta.agg.PL, batch==Batch & Abeta_pos=="neg", select="DAM_HOM_ratio", drop=T)
print(a/b)
a <- subset(meta.agg.AD, batch==Batch & Abeta_pos=="pos", select="DAM_HOM_ratio", drop=T)
b <- subset(meta.agg.AD, batch==Batch & Abeta_pos=="neg", select="DAM_HOM_ratio", drop=T)
print(a/b)
# AD组的Aβ富集区域，DAM:HOM反而比PL组的更高

# 按脑区来调查DAM:HOM ratio？
meta.agg <- aggregate(cbind(Trem2, Tyrobp, Ctsd, P2ry12, Tmem119, Cx3cr1)~treatment+cell_types, FUN=mean, data=meta.sub)
meta.agg$DAM_HOM_ratio <- meta.agg$Trem2 / meta.agg$Tmem119
for (BR in unique(meta.agg$cell_types)){
  print(BR)
  meta.agg.PL <- subset(meta.agg, treatment=="PLX5622" & cell_types==BR)
  meta.agg.AD <- subset(meta.agg, treatment=="FADCtrl" & cell_types==BR)
  a <- meta.agg.PL[, c("DAM_HOM_ratio"), drop=T]
  b <- meta.agg.AD[, c("DAM_HOM_ratio"), drop=T]
  print(a/b)
  cat("\n")
}

```

#### 不同脑区DAM:HOM ratio比较

```{r}
sc.group.rename <- c("FADCtrl"="5xFAD-CTRL", "PLX5622"="5xFAD-PLX", "WTCtrl"="WT-CTRL")
group.colors <- c("WT-CTRL"="#7570b3", "5xFAD-CTRL"="#d95f02", "5xFAD-PLX"="#1b9e77")

expr <- get_expression_values(testcombo, output="matrix")
meta <- pDataDT(testcombo)
meta$treatment <- sc.group.rename[meta$treatment]
meta$Trem2 <- expr["Trem2", ]
meta$Tmem119 <- expr["Tmem119", ]

meta.sub <- subset(meta, cell_types != "C12")

meta.agg <- aggregate(cbind(Trem2, Tmem119)~treatment+cell_types, FUN=mean, data=meta.sub)
meta.agg$DAM_HOM_ratio <- meta.agg$Trem2 / meta.agg$Tmem119
meta.agg$treatment <- factor(meta.agg$treatment, levels=c("WT-CTRL", "5xFAD-CTRL", "5xFAD-PLX"), ordered=T)

df.ad <- subset(meta.agg, treatment=="5xFAD-CTRL")
df.pl <- subset(meta.agg, treatment=="5xFAD-PLX")
df.pl$fold_change <- df.pl$DAM_HOM_ratio / df.ad$DAM_HOM_ratio
df.pl <- df.pl[order(df.pl$fold_change), ]
meta.agg$cell_types <- factor(meta.agg$cell_types, levels=df.pl$cell_types, ordered=T)

p <- ggplot(meta.agg, aes(cell_types, DAM_HOM_ratio, fill=treatment)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge") + 
  labs(x="Brain region", y="DAM:HOM ratio") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values=group.colors) + 
  coord_flip() + 
  theme(panel.background=element_blank(), panel.grid=element_blank(), 
        text=element_text(size=16, family="Arial"))

ggsave("../001ST/001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/DAM_HOM_brain_region.png", p, width=7, height=6)

```


不如直接计算DAM和Aβ下降值的相关系数？

我想要证明以下命题的真伪：

1. DAM是否更加集中于Aβ斑块。如何量化DAM富集于Aβ的程度？1. 相关系数。2. Aβ多的区域的DAM的表达量与Aβ少的区域的表达量的倍数差异。
2. DAM富集的地方，Aβ斑块清除得更多。
3. DAM较少的地方，神经元受到的损伤较少。

现有的证据是否足够？

讨论：

Abeta指数越高的区域，DAM的比率越高；
药物处理后，DAM更加富集于Aβ富集的区域。Aβ越多的区域，药物处理后下降的Aβ量也越多。
Fiber tracts是一个特殊的脑区，药物处理后，其Aβ的量不多，却有高比例的DAM。而药物处理后，其Aβ下降的量也是与AD组中该脑区Aβ的量成正比的。
ST发现了Oligo2的？调表达；SC发现Oligo有很多基因rescued了。
DAM为何聚集于Fiber tracts？

经过一番探索，结果显示DAM:HOM的提高是在全脑区范围的，并没有富集于Aβ附近的区域。其中Fiber tracts提升得最多。其次是Striatum和Isocortex。

出现这种现象得原因？1）代偿作用；2）对药物的感受性不同。
DAM比例的提升是症状缓解的原因吗？
还是说DAM绝对数目的下降才是原因？TNF炎症因子、吞噬作用等下降。
如果说DAM的下降减少了对神经元的吞噬，那如何解释Aβ的减少？

Todo: 

把上面两张图的相关系数加上。
高亮海马区。
（可选）绘制Abeta指数空间分布、Abeta下降量的空间分布、DAM:HOM ratio的空间分布。

### 5.2 Aβ与星形胶质细胞

#### 脑区、处理间Gfap表达量比较

```{r}
# 1. 读取Gfap指数到sobj@meta.data。
# 2. 根据处理、脑区、批次分组求和，然后用spot数和切片总荧光指数进行标准化。
# 3. 绘图，添加误差线。

samples <- c("FADCtrl_1", "FADCtrl_2", "WTCtrl_1", 
             "WTCtrl_2", "PLX5622_1", "PLX5622_2")

measure.list <- list()
n <- 1
for (sample in samples){
  # 读取Gfap index数据
  treatment <- strsplit(sample, "_")[[1]][1]
  batch <- strsplit(sample, "_")[[1]][2]
  if (batch=="1"){
    infile <- file.path("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence", 
                        "measurement", 
                        treatment, "Results.ch00.reshaped.csv")
  } else if (batch=="2"){
    infile <- file.path("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence",
                        "batch2", 
                        treatment, "Results.ch04.reshaped.csv")
  }
  
  measure <- read.csv(infile, row.names=1)
  # 把Abeta index合并到metadata中。
  
  measure$barcode <- paste0(sample, "-", measure$barcode)
  row.names(measure) <- measure$barcode
  measure.list[[n]] <- measure
  n <- n + 1
}
measure.df <- do.call(rbind, measure.list)

meta <- testcombo@cell_metadata$cell$rna@metaDT
meta$Gfap_index <- measure.df[meta$cell_ID, "Mean"]

meta.agg <- aggregate(Gfap_index~treatment+batch+cell_types, FUN=sum, data=meta)
meta.agg <- meta.agg[meta.agg$cell_types != "C12", ]

# normalize by sample total Gfap index. 
sample_sum <- aggregate(Gfap_index~treatment+batch, FUN=sum, data=meta)
meta.agg$sample <- paste0(meta.agg$treatment, "_", meta.agg$batch)
row.names(sample_sum) <- paste0(sample_sum$treatment, "_", sample_sum$batch)
meta.agg$Gfap_index2 <- sapply(1:nrow(meta.agg), function(x){
  meta.agg[x, "Gfap_index"] / sample_sum[meta.agg[x, "sample"], "Gfap_index"]
})
# normalize by brain region nspots. 
brain_region_nspot <- table(meta$list_ID, meta$cell_types)
brain_region_nspot <- as.data.frame.matrix(brain_region_nspot)

meta.agg$Gfap_index3 <- sapply(1:nrow(meta.agg), function(x){
  meta.agg[x, "Gfap_index2"] / brain_region_nspot[meta.agg[x, "sample"], 
                                                  meta.agg[x, "cell_types"]]
})

# 绘图
meta.agg.1 <- meta.agg[meta.agg$batch==1, ]
meta.agg.1$treatment <- factor(meta.agg.1$treatment, levels=c("WTCtrl", "FADCtrl", "PLX5622"), ordered=T)

meta.agg$treatment <- factor(meta.agg$treatment, 
                             levels=c("WTCtrl", "FADCtrl", "PLX5622"), ordered=T)
p <- ggplot(meta.agg, aes(cell_types, Gfap_index3, fill=treatment)) + 
  geom_col(position="dodge") + facet_grid(.~batch) + 
  coord_flip()

ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_Gfap.barplot.png", p)

```

```{r compare-Gfap-barplot, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="immunofluorescent staining supports that Gfap is up regulated in PLX5622 vs FADCtrl in hippocampus. "}

knitr::include_graphics("data/st/010/compare_Gfap.barplot.png")

```

### 5.3 Abeta与神经元

#### Abeta对GABA的影响

把spots分成斑块相关的和远离斑块的，然后根据deconvolution结果比较两类spots的GABA比例有何差别。这个看着比较靠谱。Abeta positive spots在图像分析里面已经做过，现在只需要载入deconvolution的结果，然后比较组间差异即可。

```{r eval=FALSE}
# 1. 划分Abeta positive spots（可以直接使用“PIGs鉴定”中的代码）
# 2. 载入deconvolution的结果（直接使用“006deconvolution::把结果整合到Giotto中”的相关代码）
# 3. 比较组间差异

# a. 整个切片的斑块区域 vs 无斑块区域，GABA比例在药物处理前后的差值没有明显变化。
meta <- data.frame(meta)
row.names(meta) <- meta$cell_ID
spot.anno.prop$Abeta_pos <- meta[spot.anno.prop$cell.id, "Abeta_pos"]

data.agg <- aggregate(GABA~Abeta_pos+sample, FUN=mean, data=spot.anno.prop)

library(ggplot2)
data.agg$treatment <- sapply(strsplit(data.agg$sample, "_"), "[", 1)
data.agg.mean <- aggregate(GABA~Abeta_pos+treatment, FUN=mean, data=data.agg)
data.agg.sd <- aggregate(GABA~Abeta_pos+treatment, FUN=sd, data=data.agg)
data.agg <- merge(data.agg.mean, data.agg.sd, by=c("Abeta_pos", "treatment"))
colnames(data.agg) <- c("Abeta_pos", "treatment", "Mean", "Sd")
p <- ggplot(data.agg, aes(treatment, Mean, fill=Abeta_pos)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Mean-Sd, ymax=Mean+Sd, group=Abeta_pos), position="dodge") +
  geom_col(position="dodge")
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/Abeta_GABA.barplot.png", p)

# 需要分不同脑区来看。现在看到的pos和neg之间的差异，可能是因为pos所在的脑区刚好是GABA含量比较少的区域。
# b. 分开脑区看，斑块区域 vs 无斑块区域，GABA比例在药物处理前后的差值没有明显变化。

# Hypothalamus、Cortical subplate两个脑区，neg区域比pos区域有更高的GABA比例，可能只是由于pos区域主要是切片边缘的Abeta假阳性信号，在切片边缘，GABA的比例肯定比较低。
data.agg <- aggregate(GABA~Abeta_pos+sample+brain.region, FUN=mean, data=spot.anno.prop)

data.agg$treatment <- sapply(strsplit(data.agg$sample, "_"), "[", 1)
data.agg.mean <- aggregate(GABA~Abeta_pos+treatment+brain.region, 
                           FUN=mean, data=data.agg)
data.agg.sd <- aggregate(GABA~Abeta_pos+treatment+brain.region, FUN=sd, data=data.agg)
data.agg <- merge(data.agg.mean, data.agg.sd, 
                  by=c("Abeta_pos", "treatment", "brain.region"))
colnames(data.agg) <- c("Abeta_pos", "treatment", "brain.region", "Mean", "Sd")
p <- ggplot(data.agg, aes(treatment, Mean, fill=Abeta_pos)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Mean-Sd, ymax=Mean+Sd, group=Abeta_pos), position="dodge") +
  geom_col(position="dodge") + facet_wrap(.~brain.region, ncol=4)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/Abeta_GABA.each_region.barplot.png", p, width=4*4, height=3*3)


# c. Olfactory area、Cortical subplate、Thalamus、Isocortex等受到Abeta影响严重的区域 vs Fiber tracts、hypothalamus等受Abeta影响较小的区域，GABA比例在药物处理前后的差值没有明显变化。
```

#### Abeta~GABA/Glu

Aβ所在脑区以GABA为主？Aβ（Thy1）与GABA的相关性分析 vs Thy1~Glu。

```{r}

setwd("../001ST/")
source("script/load_checkpoint.r")
expr <- get_expression_values(testcombo, output="matrix")

GABA.markers <- c("Gad1", "Gad2", "Slc32a1", "Atp1a3", "Atp1b1") # GABA合成基因(GAD1, GAD2, Slc32a1, Atp1a3, Atp1b1)，而不是GABA受体基因。或者deconvolution结果。
Glu.markers <- c("Slc17a6", "Slc17a7", "Satb2", "Cux2") # Glu合成、转运基因（VGLUT1, VGLUT2, Slc17a6, Slc17a7, Satb2, Cux2），而不是GABA受体基因。或者deconvolution结果。

# GABA和Glu的deconvolution 结果
deconvo <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/cell2location/level2/spot.anno.prop.csv", row.names=1)

all(deconvo$cell.id == pDataDT(testcombo)$cell_ID)
row.names(deconvo) <- deconvo$cell.id
deconvo <- deconvo[pDataDT(testcombo)$cell_ID, ]

Thy1.expr <- as.vector(expr["Thy1", ])

outdir <- "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/EI/"
dir.create(outdir)

# 与GABA/Glu 标记基因进行相关性分析。
v1 <- c() # 神经元类型
v2 <- c() # 标记基因
v3 <- c() # e
v4 <- c() # p
for (ct in c("Glu", "GABA")){
  if (ct == "Glu") {
    markers <- Glu.markers
  } else {
    markers <- GABA.markers
  }
  for (g in markers) {
    g.expr <- as.vector(expr[g, ])
    v1 <- c(v1, ct)
    v2 <- c(v2, g)
    o <- cor.test(Thy1.expr, g.expr, method="spearman")
    v3 <- c(v3, o$p.value)
    v4 <- c(v4, o$estimate)
  }
}

df <- data.frame(cell_type=v1, pvalue=v2, rho=v3)
write.csv(df, paste0(outdir, "/Glu_GABA_markers~Thy1.csv"))

# 与GABA/Glu 空间分布进行相关性分析
v1 <- c() # 神经元类型
v2 <- c() # e
v3 <- c() # p
for (i in c("Glu", "GABA")){
  cts <- grep(i, colnames(deconvo), value=T)
  for (ct in cts) {
    o <- cor.test(Thy1.expr, deconvo[[ct]], method="spearman")
    v1 <- c(v1, ct)
    v2 <- c(v2, o$p.value)
    v3 <- c(v3, o$estimate)
  }
}
df2 <- data.frame(cell_type=v1, pvalue=v2, rho=v3)
write.csv(df2, paste0(outdir, "/Glu_GABA_deconvo~Thy1.csv"))
```

### 5.4 Aβ与氧化磷酸化

#### Aβ~OXPHOS change

不同的氧化磷酸化相关DEGs具有不同的空间表达分布，但是它们在PL组比AD组的变化或许是具有脑区分布的一致性的。也就是说，都在某个脑区变化得比较大，而在另外一些脑区变化得比较小。

我们可以使用log2fc或者-log10pvalue来代表基因表达变化。可以用Aβindex来代表Aβ_plaque的量。然后按照脑区来进行相关性分析。由于有效的脑区只有8个左右，得到的结果可能在统计学显著性上欠缺。可以考虑使用更大的分辨率进行聚类，然后计算每一个小类中的log2fc和Aβ index，再进行相关性分析。

氧化磷酸化基因之间的log2fc相关性也可以分析一下。

```{r}
st.DEGs <- read.csv("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/st.DEGs.csv", row.names=1)

st.DEGs.gene <- subset(st.DEGs, gene=="mt-Atp8" & comparison=="PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl")
# 这个表格中，部分脑区并没有log2fc，因为差异不显著。
# 处理方法1. 填充0.
# 处理方法2：使用真实的log2fc。

brain_regions <- unique(st.DEGs$brain_region)

library(reshape2)

get_lfc <- function(gene){
  gene.lfc <- c()
  for (br in brain_regions) {
    df <- read.csv(paste0("../001ST/001Giotto_out/003DEGs/wilcox/", br, ".PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl.csv"), row.names=1)
    lfc <- df[gene, "avg_log2FC"]
    gene.lfc <- c(gene.lfc, lfc)
  }
  return(gene.lfc)
}

# log2fc之间的相关性。
gene <- "Ndufa3"
gene2 <- "mt-Atp8"

# workdir: docker:/home/mouse_ad/001ST
source("script/load_checkpoint.r")
expr.st <- get_expression_values(testcombo, output="matrix")
meta.st <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta.csv", row.names=1)

for (gene in c("mt-Nd1", "mt-Nd5", "mt-Nd4l", "mt-Nd2", "mt-Nd3", "mt-Nd4", "mt-Co3", "mt-Atp6", "Ndufa3", "Ndufa5", "Cox8a", "Cox7c")){

gene.lfc <- get_lfc(gene)
gene.lfc[is.na(gene.lfc)] <- 0
gene.lfc.1 <- get_lfc(gene2)
out <- cor.test(gene.lfc, gene.lfc.1, method="spearman")
print(paste0(gene, ", log2fc~log2fc, pvalue=", out$p.value, ", rho=", out$estimate))

# 空间共表达相关性。
meta.st[[gene]] <- expr.st[gene, ]
meta.st[[gene2]] <- expr.st[gene2, ]


meta.st.long <- melt(meta.st, id.vars=c("list_ID", "cell_types"), 
                     measure.vars=c("Abeta_index", gene, gene2), 
                     variable.name="gene", value.name="expr")

meta.st.agg <- aggregate(expr~list_ID + cell_types + gene, FUN=mean, data=meta.st.long)

df1 <- meta.st.agg[meta.st.agg$gene==gene & meta.st.agg$list_ID=="PLX5622_1", ]
df2 <- meta.st.agg[meta.st.agg$gene==gene2 & meta.st.agg$list_ID=="PLX5622_1", ]
df.abeta.PL1 <- meta.st.agg[meta.st.agg$gene=="Abeta_index" & meta.st.agg$list_ID=="PLX5622_1", ]
df.abeta.PL2 <- meta.st.agg[meta.st.agg$gene=="Abeta_index" & meta.st.agg$list_ID=="PLX5622_2", ]
df.abeta.AD1 <- meta.st.agg[meta.st.agg$gene=="Abeta_index" & meta.st.agg$list_ID=="FADCtrl_1", ]
df.abeta.AD2 <- meta.st.agg[meta.st.agg$gene=="Abeta_index" & meta.st.agg$list_ID=="FADCtrl_2", ]

# 假设PL1 vs AD1和PL2 vs AD2两个比较组合发生的总表达变化是一样的。
df.abeta.1 <- df.abeta.AD1
df.abeta.1$expr <- df.abeta.AD1$expr - df.abeta.PL1$expr
df.abeta.2 <- df.abeta.AD2
df.abeta.2$expr <- df.abeta.AD2$expr - df.abeta.PL2$expr

# > df.abeta.1
#      list_ID        cell_types        gene      expr
# 2  FADCtrl_1 Cortical subplate Abeta_index 1.8973565
# 8  FADCtrl_1      Fiber tracts Abeta_index 1.9556671
# 14 FADCtrl_1       Hippocampus Abeta_index 1.4335245
# 20 FADCtrl_1      Hypothalamus Abeta_index 0.2324037
# 26 FADCtrl_1         Isocortex Abeta_index 3.6700273
# 32 FADCtrl_1 Lateral Ventricle Abeta_index 1.4091005
# 38 FADCtrl_1          Meninges Abeta_index 7.7983876
# 44 FADCtrl_1    Olfactory area Abeta_index 4.0575628
# 50 FADCtrl_1          Striatum Abeta_index 0.7580066
# 56 FADCtrl_1          Thalamus Abeta_index 3.1752780
# 62 FADCtrl_1   Third Ventricle Abeta_index 3.8966669
# 
# > df.abeta.2
#      list_ID        cell_types        gene         expr
# 3  FADCtrl_2 Cortical subplate Abeta_index   2.36257067
# 9  FADCtrl_2      Fiber tracts Abeta_index  14.75602615
# 15 FADCtrl_2       Hippocampus Abeta_index   0.07551936
# 21 FADCtrl_2      Hypothalamus Abeta_index  -2.36738140
# 27 FADCtrl_2         Isocortex Abeta_index  -3.18307190
# 33 FADCtrl_2 Lateral Ventricle Abeta_index  -7.61083895
# 39 FADCtrl_2          Meninges Abeta_index -16.79609611
# 45 FADCtrl_2    Olfactory area Abeta_index  10.72963423
# 51 FADCtrl_2          Striatum Abeta_index   4.69579027
# 57 FADCtrl_2          Thalamus Abeta_index   2.54016440
# 63 FADCtrl_2   Third Ventricle Abeta_index  -4.20652222

# 两个批次之间的delta_abeta_index差异太大。可能与图像的质量相关。


out <- cor.test(df1$expr, df2$expr, method="spearman")
print(paste0(gene, ", expr~expr, pvalue=", out$p.value, ", rho=", out$estimate))

out <- cor.test(df1$expr, df.abeta$expr, method="spearman")
print(paste0(gene, ", expr~Abeta, pvalue=", out$p.value, ", rho=", out$estimate))

df.lfc <- data.frame(cell_types=brain_regions, lfc=gene.lfc)
df.merge <- merge(df.lfc, df.abeta, by="cell_types")
out <- cor.test(df.merge$lfc, df.merge$expr, method="spearman")
print(paste0(gene, ", log2fc~Abeta, pvalue=", out$p.value, ", rho=", out$estimate))

# OXPHOS gene fold change ~ Abeta_index fold change

cat("\n")
}

# [1] "mt-Nd1~log2fc, pvalue=0.0308508738328496, rho=0.663636363636364"
# [1] "mt-Nd1~expr, pvalue=0.0031151751422363, rho=0.827272727272727"
# [1] "mt-Nd1~Abeta, pvalue=0.12142915576969, rho=0.5"

# [1] "mt-Nd5~log2fc, pvalue=0.0031151751422363, rho=0.827272727272727"
# [1] "mt-Nd5~expr, pvalue=0, rho=0.936363636363636"
# [1] "mt-Nd5~Abeta, pvalue=0.0815541216928155, rho=0.554545454545455"

# [1] "mt-Nd4l~log2fc, pvalue=0.00442801687615523, rho=0.809090909090909"
# [1] "mt-Nd4l~expr, pvalue=0, rho=0.954545454545455"
# [1] "mt-Nd4l~Abeta, pvalue=0.236519264676913, rho=0.390909090909091"

# [1] "mt-Nd2~log2fc, pvalue=0.0104817749990729, rho=0.754545454545455"
# [1] "mt-Nd2~expr, pvalue=0, rho=0.936363636363636"
# [1] "mt-Nd2~Abeta, pvalue=0.0815541216928155, rho=0.554545454545455"

# [1] "mt-Nd3~log2fc, pvalue=0, rho=0.918181818181818"
# [1] "mt-Nd3~expr, pvalue=0.00256466229904208, rho=0.836363636363636"
# [1] "mt-Nd3~Abeta, pvalue=0.225014088667236, rho=0.4"

# [1] "mt-Nd4~log2fc, pvalue=0.0254755837807706, rho=0.681818181818182"
# [1] "mt-Nd4~expr, pvalue=0.000225324584283125, rho=0.9"
# [1] "mt-Nd4~Abeta, pvalue=0.172786506584626, rho=0.445454545454545"

# [1] "mt-Co3~log2fc, pvalue=0.000884153869770606, rho=0.851393052514601"
# [1] "mt-Co3~expr, pvalue=0.000948977059617062, rho=0.872727272727273"
# [1] "mt-Co3~Abeta, pvalue=0.248380568071137, rho=0.381818181818182"

# [1] "mt-Atp6~log2fc, pvalue=0.0114567316577406, rho=0.725777684110807"
# [1] "mt-Atp6~expr, pvalue=5.55408265736478e-05, rho=0.909090909090909"
# [1] "mt-Atp6~Abeta, pvalue=0.106918151178142, rho=0.518181818181818"

# [1] "Ndufa3~log2fc, pvalue=0.380889759521277, rho=0.293590337367029"
# [1] "Ndufa3~expr, pvalue=0.0403864039827663, rho=0.636363636363636"
# [1] "Ndufa3~Abeta, pvalue=0.653538937959263, rho=0.154545454545455"

# [1] "Ndufa5~log2fc, pvalue=0.091991920043484, rho=0.532132486477741"
# [1] "Ndufa5~expr, pvalue=0.468183503088795, rho=0.245454545454545"
# [1] "Ndufa5~Abeta, pvalue=0.503066960517545, rho=-0.227272727272727"

# [1] "Cox8a~log2fc, pvalue=0.179847045399238, rho=0.436199805445017"
# [1] "Cox8a~expr, pvalue=0.182531860964529, rho=0.436363636363636"
# [1] "Cox8a~Abeta, pvalue=0.576257826919622, rho=0.190909090909091"

# [1] "Cox7c~log2fc, pvalue=0.0444240278542043, rho=0.614119578862991"
# [1] "Cox7c~expr, pvalue=0.0280703042358757, rho=0.672727272727273"
# [1] "Cox7c~Abeta, pvalue=0.371067789395025, rho=0.3"


# 候选基因（lfc相关系数的pvalue小于表达里量相关系数的）：log2fc(mt-Atp8) ~ log2fc(mt-Nd3)比expr(mt-Atp8) ~ expr(mt-Nd3)更显著, Ndufa5
# log2fc(mt-Atp8)~Abeta_index没有任何基因有显著相关，连还没有进行多重检验矫正之前都没有。

# 结论：氧化磷酸化的改变有脑区特异性，但是并非与Aβ关联。

# 绘制图片：
# log2fc(mt-Nd3) ~ log2fc(mt-Atp8)
# expr(mt-Atp8) ~ expr(mt-Nd3)
# log2fc(mt-Atp8) ~ expr(mt-Nd3)
# expr(mt-Atp8) ~ log2fc(mt-Nd3)
# 把点放大，用点的颜色代表脑区，或许效果更好。

gene1 <- "mt-Atp8"
gene2 <- "mt-Nd3"
gene2 <- "Ndufa5"
gene2 <- "Ndufa3"
gene2 <- "Cox7c"

meta.st[[gene1]] <- expr.st[gene1, ]
meta.st[[gene2]] <- expr.st[gene2, ]
meta.st.long2 <- melt(meta.st, id.vars=c("treatment", "cell_types"), 
                     measure.vars=c("Abeta_index", gene1, gene2), 
                     variable.name="gene", value.name="expr")
meta.st.agg2 <- aggregate(expr~treatment + cell_types + gene, FUN=mean,
                          data=meta.st.long2)
df1 <- meta.st.agg2[meta.st.agg2$gene==gene1 & meta.st.agg2$treatment=="PLX5622", ]
df2 <- meta.st.agg2[meta.st.agg2$gene==gene2 & meta.st.agg2$treatment=="PLX5622", ]

outdir <- "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/OXPHOS"
dir.create(outdir)


lfc1 <- get_lfc(gene1)
lfc2 <- get_lfc(gene2)
df.expr <- data.frame(brain_region=df1$cell_types, expr1=df1$expr, expr2=df2$expr)
row.names(df.expr) <- df.expr$brain_region
df.expr <- df.expr[brain_regions, ]
df.expr$lfc1 <- lfc1
df.expr$lfc2 <- lfc2

o1 <- cor.test(df.expr$lfc1, df.expr$lfc2, method="spearman") # p=0, rho=0.9181818
o2 <- cor.test(df.expr$expr1, df.expr$lfc2, method="spearman") # p=0.002078, rho=0.8454545
o3 <- cor.test(df.expr$lfc1, df.expr$expr2, method="spearman") # p=0.0168, rho=0.7181818

mycolorcode = c("Isocortex"="#666666",
                "Fiber tracts"="#E7298A",
                "Thalamus"="#FF7F00",
                "Olfactory area"="#E41A1C",
                "Hypothalamus"="#377EB8",
                "Hippocampus"="#4DAF4A",
                "Cortical subplate"="#A65628",
                "Meninges"="#80B1D3",
                "Striatum"="#B3DE69",
                "Lateral Ventricle"="#D9D9D9",
                "Third Ventricle"="#BC80BD",
                "C12"="#FFED6F")

p1 <- ggplot(df.expr, aes(lfc1, lfc2)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=brain_region), size=2) + geom_smooth(method="lm") + 
  labs(x=paste0("log2fc(", gene1, ")"), y=paste0("log2fc(", gene2, ")")) + 
  scale_color_manual(values=mycolorcode) + 
  theme(text=element_text(family="Arial"), panel.background=element_blank(), 
        legend.position="none")

# p2 <- ggplot(df.expr, aes(expr1, expr2)) + 
#   geom_point(size=0.2) + geom_smooth(method="lm") + 
#   labs(x=paste0("expr(", gene1, ")"), y=paste0("expr(", gene2, ")")) + 
#   theme(text=element_text(family="Arial"), panel.background=element_blank())

p3 <- ggplot(df.expr, aes(expr1, lfc2)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=brain_region), size=2) + geom_smooth(method="lm") + 
  labs(x=paste0("expr(", gene1, ")"), y=paste0("log2fc(", gene2, ")")) + 
  scale_color_manual(values=mycolorcode) + 
  theme(text=element_text(family="Arial"), panel.background=element_blank())

library(patchwork)
p <- p1 | p3

# ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", gene1, ".", gene2, ".lfc.png"), p1, width=2.5, height=2.5)
# ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", gene1, ".", gene2, ".expr.png"), p2, width=2.5, height=2.5)
# ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", gene1, ".", gene2, ".expr_lfc.png"), p3, width=2.5, height=2.5)

ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", gene1, ".", gene2, ".png"), p, width=4*2, height=3.5)
```

## 6 整理GFAP和P2RY12 index表格

两个批次，每个批次有3个个体，总共6个表格。需要合并在一起。

```{r}
outdir <- "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence"
meta <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta.csv", row.names=1)

#############################################################################

treatments <- c("FADCtrl", "WTCtrl", "PLX5622")

for (i.gene in c("P2ry12", "Gfap")){
  measure.list <- list()
  n <- 1
  for (treatment in treatments){
    for (batch in c("1", "2")){
      sample <- paste0(treatment, "_", batch)
      cat("doing sample:", sample, ";", "gene:", i.gene, "\n")
      if (batch == "1"){
        save.dir <- file.path(outdir, "measurement")
        if (i.gene == "P2ry12") {
          channel <- "ch01"
        } else if (i.gene == "Gfap"){
          channel <- "ch00"
        }
        infile <- file.path(save.dir, 
                            treatment, 
                            paste0("Results.", channel, ".reshaped.csv"))
      } else if (batch == "2") {
        save.dir <- file.path(outdir, "batch2")
        if (i.gene == "P2ry12") {
          channel <- "ch03"
        } else if (i.gene == "Gfap"){
          channel <- "ch04"
        }
        infile <- file.path(save.dir, 
                            treatment, 
                            paste0("Results.", channel, ".reshaped.csv"))
      }
      measure <- read.csv(infile, row.names=1)
      measure$barcode <- paste0(sample, "-", measure$barcode)
      
      row.names(measure) <- measure$barcode
      measure.list[[n]] <- measure
      n <- n + 1
    }
  }
  measure.df <- do.call(rbind, measure.list)
  meta[[i.gene]] <- measure.df[meta$cell_ID, "Mean"]
}

write.csv(meta, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta_GFAP_P2RY12.csv")
```


## 与GFAP相关的细胞类型

1，读取GFAP index表格。
2，读取per spot cell proportion表格。
3，相关性分析。


```{r}

meta <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta_GFAP_P2RY12.csv", row.names=1)

df.deconvo <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/cell2location/level2/spot.anno.prop.csv", row.names=1)
meta <- merge(meta, df.deconvo, by.x="cell_ID", by.y="cell.id")

proteins <- c("Gfap", "P2ry12", "Abeta_index")
cells <- colnames(meta)[18:54]

protein.vec <- c()
cell.vec <- c()
p.vec <- c()
rho.vec <- c()
n <- 1
for (protein in proteins) {
  for (cell in cells) {
    r <- cor.test(meta[[protein]], meta[[cell]], method="spearman")
    protein.vec[n] <- protein
    cell.vec[n] <- cell
    p.vec[n] <- r$p.value
    rho.vec[n] <- r$estimate
    n <- n + 1
  }
}

out.df <- data.frame(protein=protein.vec, cell_type=cell.vec, pvalue=p.vec, rho=rho.vec) 
out.df <- out.df[order(out.df$pvalue), ]
write.csv(out.df, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/GFAP_P2RY12_Abeta_index__cor__cell_types.csv")

head(out.df, 10)
#         protein cell_type        pvalue       rho
# 29         Gfap Micro_0_1  0.000000e+00 0.3676464
# 65       P2ry12 Micro_0_0  0.000000e+00 0.3390935
# 23         Gfap     Glu_5 1.410049e-291 0.2652368
# 103 Abeta_index Micro_0_1 6.194182e-278 0.2591298
# 67       P2ry12 Micro_0_2 4.995678e-263 0.2522634
# 30         Gfap Micro_0_2 2.821899e-250 0.2462165
# 19         Gfap    Glu_12 7.900699e-249 0.2455197
# 99  Abeta_index     Glu_7 1.095206e-235 0.2390866
# 24         Gfap     Glu_6 6.136448e-191 0.2155707
# 16         Gfap     Glu_1 5.137212e-188 0.2139352

```


## 与GFAP相关的基因2

之前是每个样品分别进行相关性分析。其实可以多个样品合在一起做相关性分析。

```{r}
library(Giotto)
# 加载gobj
gobj <- readRDS("001Giotto_out/testcombo.rds")
# 加载包含GFAP、P2RY12和Abeta index的metadata表格。
meta <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta_GFAP_P2RY12.csv", row.names=1)

df.deconvo <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/cell2location/level2/spot.anno.prop.csv", row.names=1)
meta <- merge(meta, df.deconvo, by.x="cell_ID", by.y="cell.id")

# 确定metadata表格和gobj中的metadata表格顺序一致。
meta.gobj <- meta[match(pDataDT(gobj)$cell_ID, meta$cell_ID), ] # match(a, b)返回的是b中的每一项在a中的秩。
all(meta.gobj$cell_ID == pDataDT(gobj)$cell_ID) # True

# 对每个基因和GFAP index执行相关性分析。
