```{r}
expr <- get_expression_values(gobj, output="matrix")

# 定向计算 Spearman 相关及 p 值
library(WGCNA)
target_data <- as.matrix(meta.gobj[, c(13:15, 18:54)])
expr.t <- t(as.matrix(expr))

# 根据估算（全部细胞类型 + 三种蛋白） ~ 所有基因，运行时长为1.30148小时。
start_time <- Sys.time()
result <- corAndPvalue(target_data, expr.t[, 1:100], method = "spearman")
end_time <- Sys.time() # 记录终止时间
end_time - start_time # 计算时间差

# 只计算细胞类型 ~ 所有基因
result <- corAndPvalue(meta.gobj[, 18:54], expr.t, method = "spearman")
# 提取结果
cor_values <- data.frame(result$cor)  # 相关系数向量
cor_values$cell_type <- row.names(cor_values) # 添加蛋白质名称
out.df.cor <- melt(cor_values, id.vars="cell_type", variable.name="gene", value.name="rho")

p_values <- data.frame(result$p)      # p 值向量
p_values$cell_type <- row.names(p_values) # 添加蛋白质名称
out.df.p <- melt(p_values, id.vars="cell_type", variable.name="gene", value.name="pvalue")

out.df <- merge(out.df.cor, out.df.p, by=c("cell_type", "gene"))
write.csv(out.df, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/cell_type__cor__genes.csv")
out.df <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/cell_type__cor__genes.csv", row.names=1)
out.df <- out.df[order(out.df$cell_type, out.df$pvalue, out.df$rho, decreasing=c(F, F, T), method = "radix"), ]
library(dplyr)
top10_per_category <- out.df %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
write.csv(top10_per_category, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/cell_type__cor__genes_pos.top10.csv")

out.df <- out.df[order(out.df$cell_type, out.df$pvalue, out.df$rho, decreasing=c(F, F, F), method = "radix"), ]
top10_per_category <- out.df %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
write.csv(top10_per_category, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/cell_type__cor__genes_pos.neg.top10.csv")

# 只计算三种蛋白 ~ 所有基因。
result <- corAndPvalue(meta.gobj[, 13:15], expr.t, method = "spearman")

# 提取结果
cor_values <- data.frame(result$cor)  # 相关系数向量
cor_values$protein <- row.names(cor_values) # 添加蛋白质名称
out.df.cor <- melt(cor_values, id.vars="protein", variable.name="gene", value.name="rho")

p_values <- data.frame(result$p)      # p 值向量
p_values$protein <- row.names(p_values) # 添加蛋白质名称
out.df.p <- melt(p_values, id.vars="protein", variable.name="gene", value.name="pvalue")

out.df <- merge(out.df.cor, out.df.p, by=c("protein", "gene"))
write.csv(out.df, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/GFAP_P2RY12_Abeta_index__cor__genes.csv")

out.df.gfap <- subset(out.df, protein=="Gfap")
out.df.gfap <- out.df.gfap[order(out.df.gfap$pvalue), ]
head(out.df.gfap, 10)
#       protein      gene        rho        pvalue
# 20441    Gfap       C4b  0.3336450  0.000000e+00
# 24036    Gfap      Gfap  0.5013772  0.000000e+00
# 21875    Gfap      Cst7  0.2307664 2.874969e-219
# 31775    Gfap     Rims3 -0.2299671 1.004242e-217
# 20544    Gfap   Camk2n2 -0.2110344 6.837090e-183
# 32485    Gfap Serpina3n  0.2028666 7.150034e-169
# 32765    Gfap   Slc17a6 -0.1958484 2.645571e-157
# 35101    Gfap    Tyrobp  0.1927454 2.496690e-152
# 29032    Gfap    Nap1l5 -0.1922208 1.697972e-151
# 34904    Gfap   Tsc22d3 -0.1887851 4.195226e-146

```

# 与P2ry12相关的基因

```{r}
gobj <- readRDS("001Giotto_out/testcombo.rds")
# 加载包含GFAP、P2RY12和Abeta index的metadata表格。
meta <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta_GFAP_P2RY12.csv", row.names=1)
expr <- get_expression_values(gobj, output="matrix")
```


# 与Slc1a2相关的因素？

```{r}

# 从上面得到的结果提取信息。
# 1. Slc1a2和星胶的相关性比和神经元的相关性高？
# 2. Slc1a2和Astro_1的相关性比和其他星胶亚型的相关性高？
# 3. Slc1a2和小胶质细胞的相关系数在三个组别组的差异？
# 4. PLX组DAM附近的谷氨酸转运比AD组的表达更高。使用柱形图或者箱线图展示？
#   按脑区展示。
#   根据Aβ或者DAM的系数对spot进行分组。


out.df <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/cell_type__cor__genes.csv", row.names=1)
out.df.sub <- subset(out.df, gene %in% c("Slc1a2", "Slc1a3"))
out.df.sub.pos <- out.df.sub[order(out.df.sub$gene, out.df.sub$pvalue, 
                       out.df.sub$rho, decreasing=c(F, F, T), method = "radix"), ]

# 结果：
# 1. Slc1a2和Glu_0的相关系数最大（0.54566332）。Slc1a3和GABA_3相关系数最大（0.32417331）
# 2. Slc1a2和Astro_1的相关系数比Astro_2大一点分别是0.44936438和0.41834939。与Astro_0负相关。Slc1a3和几种Astro亚型的关系和Slc1a2相似。

# 3. Slc1a2在AD组相比WT组表达下降？

# 绘制相关性点图。
library(Giotto)
# 加载gobj
gobj <- readRDS("001Giotto_out/testcombo.rds")
# 加载包含GFAP、P2RY12和Abeta index的metadata表格。
meta <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta_GFAP_P2RY12.csv", row.names=1)

df.deconvo <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/cell2location/level2/spot.anno.prop.csv", row.names=1)
meta <- merge(meta, df.deconvo, by.x="cell_ID", by.y="cell.id")

# 确定metadata表格和gobj中的metadata表格顺序一致。
meta.gobj <- meta[match(pDataDT(gobj)$cell_ID, meta$cell_ID), ] # match(a, b)返回的是b中的每一项在a中的秩。
all(meta.gobj$cell_ID == pDataDT(gobj)$cell_ID) # True

# 对每个基因和GFAP index执行相关性分析。

expr <- get_expression_values(gobj, output="matrix")

# 定向计算 Spearman 相关及 p 值
library(WGCNA)
target_data <- as.matrix(meta.gobj[, c(13:15, 18:54)])
expr.t <- t(as.matrix(expr))

# 三个处理分别计算。Slc1a2 ~ DAM
meta.gobj$Slc1a2 <- expr.t[, "Slc1a2"]
meta.gobj$Slc1a3 <- expr.t[, "Slc1a3"]

treatments <- c()
pvalue <- c()
rho <- c()
cellt <- c()
gene2 <- c()
n <- 1

for (ct in c("Micro_0_0", "Micro_0_1")) {
  for (g2 in c("Slc1a2", "Slc1a3")) {
    for (treat in unique(meta.gobj$treatment)) {
      meta.sub <- subset(meta.gobj, treatment==treat)
      cor.out <- cor.test(meta.sub[[ct]], meta.sub[[g2]], method="spearman")
      treatments[n] <- treat
      pvalue[n] <- cor.out$p.value
      rho[n] <- cor.out$estimate
      cellt[n] <- ct
      gene2[n] <- g2
      n <- n + 1
    }
  }
}

df <- data.frame(treatment=treatments, pvalue=pvalue, rho=rho, celltype=cellt, gene2=gene2)

df


# 稳态型小胶和Slc1a2正相关。药物处理组的相关系数比AD组小了一些。
# DAM和Slc1a2负相关。AD组、PL组比WT组负得更多。

# 根据这个结果，只能说DAM附近的谷氨酸转运会下降，但不能说PLX组的谷氨酸转运有恢复。
# 但这也不能证明PLX组的谷氨酸转运没有恢复。因为DAM的绝对比例确实下降了，谷氨酸转运会恢复，这也能说得通。
# 可能还是要用ST DEGs的柱形图来说明。

```

# 按照Aβ index进行为H/L

1，沿用了PIGs鉴定过程中的阈值。
2，读取gobj
3，获取C1qa表达量。
4，根据Aβ阈值对spots进行分类。
5，比较Aβ高和Aβ低区域的C1qa耗竭率，注意data slots是经过了log scale的。

```{r}

gobj <- readRDS("001ST/001Giotto_out/testcombo.rds")

meta <- read.csv("001ST/001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta.csv", row.names=1)
all(meta$cell_ID == pDataDT(gobj)$cell_ID)
# [1] TRUE

Abeta_index_cutoff <- 10
meta$Abeta_pos <- ifelse(meta$Abeta_index > Abeta_index_cutoff, 
                          yes = "pos", no="neg")

# 获取C1qa表达量
expr <- get_expression_values(gobj, values="normalized", output="matrix")
meta$C1qa <- as.vector(expr["C1qa", ])

# 比较Aβ高和Aβ低区域的C1qa耗竭率
AD.pos <- subset(meta, Abeta_pos=="pos" & treatment == "FADCtrl")
PL.pos <- subset(meta, Abeta_pos=="pos" & treatment == "PLX5622")

```

# IF、ST、SN的一致性

## GFAP.IF ~ Astro_2.DE(细分脑区)。

为了去除处理效应、批次效应，需要让样本点可以相互匹配。如果取当前共有的11个脑区，感觉太少。不如取细分聚类结果。

```{r}
# 加载IF结果
meta <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta_GFAP_P2RY12.csv", row.names=1)

# 加载ST表达矩阵
gobj <- readRDS("001Giotto_out/testcombo.rds")
expr.st <- get_expression_values(gobj, output="matrix")
meta$P2ry12.st <- as.vector(expr.st["P2ry12", ])
meta$P2ry12.st <- as.vector(expr.st["P2ry12", ])
meta$Gfap.st <- as.vector(expr.st["Gfap", ])
meta$Thy1.st <- as.vector(expr.st["Thy1", ])

# 加载去卷积结果
df.deconvo <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/cell2location/level2/spot.anno.prop.csv", row.names=1)

# 加载ST细分聚类结果（只保留共有cluster）
meta.subclustered <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/001preprocess/gobj.meta.subclustered.csv", row.names=1)
library(reshape2)
df <- aggregate(cell_ID~treatment+cell_types.sub, FUN=length, data=meta.subclustered)
df2 <- dcast(cell_types.sub~treatment, data=df)
df2[is.na(df2)] <- 0
df3 <- df2[apply(df2[, -1], 1, min) > 10, ] # 保留每个处理都有10个spot以上的subcluster。
gobj.meta.sub <- subset(meta.subclustered, cell_types.sub %in% df3$cell_types.sub)

# 合并IF结果和去卷积结果
meta2 <- merge(gobj.meta.sub[, c("cell_ID", "treatment", "batch", "cell_types", "cell_types.sub")], 
      meta[, c("cell_ID", "Abeta_index", "P2ry12", "Gfap", "Thy1.st", "P2ry12.st", "Gfap.st")], 
      by = "cell_ID")

meta3 <- merge(meta2, df.deconvo[, -(2:3)], by.x="cell_ID", by.y="cell.id")

meta3 <- meta3[, -c(1,4)]

# 根据细分脑区进行汇总
meta.agg <- aggregate(.~treatment+batch+cell_types.sub, FUN=mean, data=meta3)
write.csv(meta.agg, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/modal_consistency.csv", row.names=F)


# 不考虑批次、处理，进行相关性分析。
cor.test(meta.agg$Gfap, meta.agg$Astro_0, method="spearman")
cor.test(meta.agg$Gfap, meta.agg$Astro_1, method="spearman")
cor.test(meta.agg$Gfap, meta.agg$Astro_2, method="spearman")

# 尝试矫正批次效应、处理效应之后进行相关性分析
library(limma)
meta.agg.corrected <- removeBatchEffect(t(meta.agg[, -(1:3)]), batch=meta.agg$treatment, batch2=meta.agg$batch)
meta.agg.corrected <- data.frame(t(meta.agg.corrected))
cor.test(meta.agg.corrected$Gfap, meta.agg.corrected$Astro_0, method="spearman")
cor.test(meta.agg.corrected$Gfap, meta.agg.corrected$Astro_1, method="spearman")
cor.test(meta.agg.corrected$Gfap, meta.agg.corrected$Astro_2, method="spearman")

# 尝试只取特定样品
for(treat in c("WTCtrl", "FADCtrl", "PLX5622")) {
  meta.agg.sub <- subset(meta.agg, treatment == treat)
  for (ct in c("Astro_0", "Astro_1", "Astro_2", "Micro_0_0", "Micro_0_1", "Micro_0_2")) {
    result <- cor.test(meta.agg.sub$Gfap, meta.agg.sub[[ct]], method="spearman")
    pvalue <- result$p.value
    rho <- result$estimate
    cat("Treatment:", treat, "; Cell type:", ct, "; p-value:", pvalue, "; rho:", rho, "\n")
  }
}

# Treatment: WTCtrl ; Cell type: Astro_0 ; p-value: 0.2108353 ; rho: -0.1412799
# Treatment: WTCtrl ; Cell type: Astro_1 ; p-value: 0.197709 ; rho: 0.1454055
# Treatment: WTCtrl ; Cell type: Astro_2 ; p-value: 2.37744e-06 ; rho: 0.5059541

# Treatment: FADCtrl ; Cell type: Astro_0 ; p-value: 0.02507886 ; rho: -0.2447504
# Treatment: FADCtrl ; Cell type: Astro_1 ; p-value: 6.65257e-05 ; rho: 0.4246634
# Treatment: FADCtrl ; Cell type: Astro_2 ; p-value: 3.529308e-06 ; rho: 0.4871722

# Treatment: PLX5622 ; Cell type: Astro_0 ; p-value: 0.1491301 ; rho: -0.1586919
# Treatment: PLX5622 ; Cell type: Astro_1 ; p-value: 0.4529111 ; rho: 0.08285917
# Treatment: PLX5622 ; Cell type: Astro_2 ; p-value: 0.21924 ; rho: 0.1353245

```

## 使用柱形图来展示

```{r}
# 1，使用细分脑区，只保留共有的脑区。
# 直接使用上面的meta.agg。
setwd("/home/mouse_ad/001ST")
meta.agg <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/modal_consistency.csv")

# 2，把前面的合并数据的代码的步骤用中文描述出来。

# 3，把AD组的细分脑区Abeta_index减去WT组的，得到矫正后的各脑区的Aβ index。
WT <- subset(meta.agg, treatment == "WTCtrl", select=c("batch", "cell_types.sub", "Abeta_index"))
AD <- subset(meta.agg, treatment == "FADCtrl", select=c("batch", "cell_types.sub", "Abeta_index"))
meta.agg.diff <- merge(WT, AD, by=c("cell_types.sub", "batch"), suffixes=c("_WT", "_AD"))
meta.agg.diff$Abeta_index.corrected <- meta.agg.diff$Abeta_index_AD - meta.agg.diff$Abeta_index_WT
meta.agg.diff2 <- aggregate(Abeta_index.corrected~cell_types.sub, FUN=mean, data=meta.agg.diff)
meta.agg.diff2 <- meta.agg.diff2[order(meta.agg.diff2$Abeta_index.corrected), ]

# 4，对该脑区按照校正后的Aβ index进行排序，得到High Aβ brain region（H）和Low Aβ brain region（L）。
# 其中Isortex、hippo既有高Aβindex，也有低Aβ index，是不错的研究材料。
# 设置H和L的定义标准，可能要考虑脑区占比。现在先随便定一个看起来比较客观的：前50%
meta.agg.diff2 <- meta.agg.diff2[order(meta.agg.diff2$Abeta_index.corrected), ]
nrow(meta.agg.diff2)
meta.agg.diff2$Abeta_group <- ifelse(1:nrow(meta.agg.diff2) <= nrow(meta.agg.diff2)/2, "L", "H")

# 5，根据H和L对各个指标进行汇总，并绘制柱形图。
H.region <- meta.agg.diff2$cell_types.sub[meta.agg.diff2$Abeta_group == "H"]
meta.agg$Abeta_group <- ifelse(meta.agg$cell_types.sub %in% H.region, "H", "L")

write.csv(meta.agg, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/modal_consistency.group_by_Abeta.csv")
meta.agg <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/modal_consistency.group_by_Abeta.csv", row.names=1)

# Astrocytes
library(dplyr)
# meta.agg.summary <- meta.agg %>%
#   group_by(treatment, Abeta_group) %>%
#   summarise(across(c(Gfap, Astro_0, Astro_1, Astro_2), mean))

# Microglia
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
dir.create("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/ST_SN_IF_consistency")

meta.agg.summary <- meta.agg %>%
  group_by(treatment, Abeta_group) %>%
  summarise(across(c(P2ry12, P2ry12.st, Micro_0_0, Micro_0_1, Micro_0_2), mean))

# version 1
p.list <- list()

for (i in c("P2ry12", "P2ry12.st", "Micro_0_0", "Micro_0_1", "Micro_0_2")) {
  data <- meta.agg.summary[, c("treatment", "Abeta_group", i)]
  colnames(data) <- c("treatment", "Abeta_group", "expr")
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x=Abeta_group, y=expr)) + 
    geom_bar(stat="identity") + 
    labs(x="Aβ group", y=paste0(i, " expression")) + 
    facet_grid(.~ treatment) +
    theme(text=element_text(family="Arial"), panel.background=element_blank(), 
          legend.position="top")
  p.list[[i]] <- p
}

pall <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=1)

ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/ST_SN_IF_consistency/P2RY12_Micro.png", pall, width=6, height=8)

# version 2
colnames(meta.agg.summary) <- c("treatment", "Abeta_group", "P2RY12", "P2ry12", "HOM", "DAM", "Micro_0_2")

p.list <- list()

for (i in c("P2RY12", "P2ry12", "HOM", "DAM", "Micro_0_2")) {
  data <- meta.agg.summary[, c("treatment", "Abeta_group", i)]
  data$treatment <- factor(data$treatment, levels=c("WTCtrl", "FADCtrl", "PLX5622"), ordered=T)
  colnames(data) <- c("treatment", "Abeta_group", "expr")
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x=Abeta_group, y=expr, fill=treatment)) + 
    geom_bar(stat="identity") + 
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("WTCtrl"="#FBDCBF", "FADCtrl"="#F39B9A", "PLX5622"="#BBBBDE"))
  
  if (i %in% c("P2RY12", "P2ry12")){
    p <- p + labs(y=paste0(i, " Expression"))
  } else {
    p <- p + labs(y=paste0(i, " Proportion"))
  }
  
  p <- p + facet_grid(.~ treatment) +
    theme(text=element_text(family="Arial"), 
          panel.background=element_blank(), 
          legend.position="none", 
          strip.text=element_blank(), 
          axis.title.x = element_blank())
  p.list[[i]] <- p
}

pall <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=5)

ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/ST_SN_IF_consistency/P2RY12_Micro.v2.png", pall, width=10, height=3)
# /storage/lch/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/001ST/001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/ST_SN_IF_consistency

# 计算差异显著性。
# 处理内部，H和L之间的差异。
meta.agg.summary2 <- meta.agg %>%
  group_by(treatment, batch, Abeta_group) %>%
  summarise(across(c(P2ry12, P2ry12.st, Micro_0_0, Micro_0_1, Micro_0_2), mean))

for (Treat in c("FADCtrl", "WTCtrl", "PLX5622")){
  df <- subset(meta.agg.summary2, treatment == Treat)
  for (Feat in c("P2ry12", "P2ry12.st", "Micro_0_0", "Micro_0_1", "Micro_0_2")) {
    Y.corrected <- removeBatchEffect(t(df[[Feat]]), batch=df$batch)
    H <- Y.corrected[df$Abeta_group == "H"]
    L <- Y.corrected[df$Abeta_group == "L"]
    O <- t.test(H, L) # p=0.085
    cat("Treatment:", Treat, "; Feature:", Feat, "; p-value:", O$p.value, "\n")
  }
}

# 结果描述：
# 1，虽然H和L之间的差异并不是都有，但至少在某些条件下可以检测出来。
# 2，不同处理之间的差异比较明显。
# 3，不同细胞亚型之间的差异也能看出来。
# 4，和预期有点出入。空转中P2ry12在H和L之间居然没有差异，和IF以及DE不一样。但可以进行解释。IF代表的是过去的转录表达产物，ST代表
#   的是当前的转录表达状态（单个基因）。DE代表的是细胞比例（综合多个基因进行推测）。
# 是不是要考虑把单核、细胞比例也考虑进去？
# 处理之间的差异？
```

## GFAP.IF ~ Astro_2.DE(所有spots)。

```{r}
# 加载IF结果
meta <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/meta.Abeta_GFAP_P2RY12.csv", row.names=1)

# 加载去卷积结果
df.deconvo <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/cell2location/level2/spot.anno.prop.csv", row.names=1)
df.deconvo2 <- data.frame(df.deconvo[, 4:ncol(df.deconvo)], row.names=df.deconvo$cell.id)
df.deconvo2 <- df.deconvo2[meta$cell_ID, ]
meta.if.de <- cbind(meta, df.deconvo2)

cor.test(meta.if.de$Gfap, meta.if.de$Astro_2, method="spearman")
# data:  meta.if.de$Gfap and meta.if.de$Astro_2
# S = 8.2324e+11, p-value < 2.2e-16
# alternative hypothesis: true rho is not equal to 0
# sample estimates:
#       rho
# 0.1885793

cor.test(meta.if.de$P2ry12, meta.if.de$Micro_0_0, method="spearman")
# data:  meta.if.de$P2ry12 and meta.if.de$Micro_0_0
# S = 6.7053e+11, p-value < 2.2e-16
# alternative hypothesis: true rho is not equal to 0
# sample estimates:
#       rho
# 0.3390935

```


## Trem2表达在Aβ-H脑区比Aβ-L脑区高

```{r}
# 需要的数据：四列，1）Aβ-H/Aβ-L。2）分组信息。3）Trem2表达。4）P2ry12表达。

# 1，加载Aβ分组结果
meta.agg <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/modal_consistency.group_by_Abeta.csv", row.names=1)

# 2，加载ST细分聚类结果（只保留共有cluster）
meta.subclustered <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/001preprocess/gobj.meta.subclustered.csv", row.names=1)

# 合并1和2，根据细分脑区ID
br2group <- meta.agg$Abeta_group
names(br2group) <- meta.agg$cell_types.sub
meta.subclustered.sub <- subset(meta.subclustered, cell_types.sub %in% meta.agg$cell_types.sub)
meta.subclustered.sub$Abeta_group <- br2group[meta.subclustered.sub$cell_types.sub]

# 加载ST表达矩阵，用于提取Trem2表达量。
gobj <- readRDS("001Giotto_out/testcombo.rds")
meta.st <- pDataDT(gobj)
expr.st <- get_expression_values(gobj, output="matrix", values="normalized")
meta.st$Trem2 <- as.vector(expr.st["Trem2", ])
meta.st$Tmem119 <- as.vector(expr.st["Tmem119", ])

# 3，合并1和2和3
meta.st.sub <- merge(meta.subclustered.sub[, c("cell_ID", "Abeta_group")], 
                        meta.st[, c("cell_ID", "treatment", "batch", "Trem2", "Tmem119")], 
                        by = "cell_ID")

write.csv(meta.st.sub, "001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_Trem2_in_Abeta-H_and_Abeta-L.csv", row.names=F)

meta.st.sub <- read.csv("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/compare_Trem2_in_Abeta-H_and_Abeta-L.csv")

# 绘图
meta.st.sub2 <- subset(meta.st.sub, treatment=="FADCtrl")

# v1: 默认boxplot
p <- ggplot(meta.st.sub2, aes(x=Abeta_group, y=Trem2, fill=treatment)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + 
  labs(x="Aβ group", y="Trem2 Expression") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("FADCtrl"="#F39B9A")) +
  theme(text=element_text(family="Arial"), panel.background=element_blank(), legend.position="top")

ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/Trem2_in_Abeta-H_and_Abeta-L.png", p, width=4, height=4)
# /storage/lch/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/001ST/001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/

# 统计检验。
Trem2.H <- meta.st.sub2$Trem2[meta.st.sub2$Abeta_group == "H"]
Trem2.L <- meta.st.sub2$Trem2[meta.st.sub2$Abeta_group == "L"]
t.test(Trem2.H, Trem2.L)

# 使用ggpubr包绘制箱线图
library(ggpubr)
# v2: 使用ggpubr包绘制箱线图
p1 <- ggboxplot(meta.st.sub2, x="Abeta_group", y="Trem2", fill="treatment", 
               palette=c("FADCtrl"="#F39B9A"), 
               xlab="Aβ group", ylab="Trem2 Expression") +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("H", "L")), label = "p.signif", method = "t.test") +
  theme(text=element_text(family="Arial"), panel.background=element_blank(), legend.position="none")

p2 <- ggboxplot(meta.st.sub2, x="Abeta_group", y="Tmem119", fill="treatment", 
               palette=c("FADCtrl"="#F39B9A"), 
               xlab="Aβ group", ylab="Tmem119 Expression") +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("H", "L")), label = "p.signif", method = "t.test") +
  theme(text=element_text(family="Arial"), panel.background=element_blank(), legend.position="none")

pall <- p1 + p2 + plot_layout(ncol=2)
ggsave("001Giotto_out/010immunofluorescence/merged/Trem2_in_Abeta-H_and_Abeta-L.v2.png", pall, width=4, height=4)
```
